Then use the corresponding Extracting Nano Resin to extract the main material in the solution. The rest (Chlorinated Rare Earth Concentrate) is still rich in useful lanthanides.

You can use any type Extracting Nano Resin to extract the useful things in the rest. What Nano Resin you use, what lanthanide you'll get. Every bucket of Chlorinated Rare Earth Concentrate can do this extraction 3 times. First Concentrate to Enriched Solution, then Enriched Solution to Diluted Solution, then waste liquid.

After extracting, the Nano Resin will be "Filled". Put them "Filled" into Electrolyzer then nanites will transfer the "Particles" out from the resin under the influence of electric field. And you can get the Nano Resins and let them go into the next work round, again and again without breaks.

Yes, Rare Earth will not be Rare. Bless the Nano Tech.

-7392996829794634546:3724622962283661540.name: Asgardandelion
-7392996829794634546:3724622962283661540.desc: A passive mana generating flower that can produce a never-ending torrent of mana.

-6681769780387992396:3481706333218622590.name: Smelling Even Better
-6681769780387992396:3481706333218622590.desc:
Livens will increase your Incense from 800 to 1500.
Viridis will increase it even further from 1500 to 2400.

-6702648857746689045:3501584859493057361.name: Fountain Of Alchemy
-6702648857746689045:3501584859493057361.desc:
The Fountain of Alchemy as you may guess, is functionally just like the Mana Fountain, except it can handle the recipes that you would typically need an Alchemy Rune underneath a Mana Pool for.

If you need any further details about it's functionality, check out the Mana Fountain quest or the Lexica Botania.

[warn]This cannot do regular Mana Pool recipes, only Alchemy recipes.[/warn]

[note]If, for whatever reason, you needed an abundance of prismarine in the future... perhaps a quad Fountain of Alchemy would be an excellent aid in obtaining that.[/note]

-6025086176596606172:3528043879675347832.name: Super Stock Replenisher
-6025086176596606172:3528043879675347832.desc:
The Super Stock Replenisher is an incredibly useful item, especially for those pesky loop automations!

To use, put a storage cell in the empty slot (item vs fluid & type amount do not matter) and you can set up to 63 items & 9 fluids to be stocked by the machine. The total quantity of both items and fluids are determined by the byte size of the storage cell.

When an item / fluid is stocked, it will pull it from the ME network it is attached to and those items / fluids will become invisible to your network. You can then use a storage bus to make these items visible to a subnet. Items will not be able to re-enter the block once pulled out.

[note]When an item or fluid is erased from the stocker or when the stocker is broken, everything will return to the network the stocker was attached too, so no need to panic about losing items.[/note]

-6359478362695243961:3743002618129826657.name: EV 64A Hatches
-6359478362695243961:3743002618129826657.desc: You get the idea, these ones do 64A!

-7942941687928335173:3580739273431663441.name: Obsidian Shulker Box
-7942941687928335173:3580739273431663441.desc:
The portable equivalent of the Obsidian Barrel that retains it's explosion-proof qualities.

Has 108 slots.

[note]Can be Dyed![/note]

-5211315330207694591:3602109966171458981.name: Tier 2 Manipulating
-5211315330207694591:3602109966171458981.desc:
After significant progression, you'll be able to upgrade the QFT to tier 2 by replacing the Neutron Pulse Manipulator casings with Cosmic Fabric Manipulator casings. Once installed, the QFT can perform the monaline skip, the first two naqline skips, and the netherite line skip.

These casings require more advanced materials, including Hyper-Stable Self-Healing Adhesive, which can only be crafted in a tier 1 QFT. This adhesive isn’t just excellent at sticking things together - it’s also built to withstand the intense energy flow of a tier 2, 3, or even tier 4 QFT! 

Who knows what kinds of materials you’ll need after this?!

-9189987553802947566:3612334847691605768.name: Yet Another Space Elevator Upgrade
-9189987553802947566:3612334847691605768.desc: This bad boi can handle 18 modules at once.

-5743099320722310498:3614899307475259201.name: Raw Tin Ore Exchange
-5743099320722310498:3614899307475259201.desc: You can exchange your stack of Raw Tin Ore for IC2 Tin Ore.

-7903790571940902730:3665289223094290964.name: Supersized Buses
-7903790571940902730:3665289223094290964.desc:
Input and output buses not holding enough for you?

Upgrade your buses to the Super bus and enjoy increased slots.

[note]To get Molten Silicon Carbide without an ABS, you can make Silicon Carbide Dust in a Mixer, then smelt it and fluid extract.[/note]

-8395721167357407219:3676135536569959135.name: Remote requests
-8395721167357407219:3676135536569959135.desc:
Remote requests aren't always convenient. As long as you are in range with a request pipe, the remote orderer can take the order and send it to a request pipe the orderer binds to.

Pretty handy if you have an ender chest and an ender pouch...

[note]Author's note: Too bad ender chests and pouches are gated behind IV and thaumcraft... And why people would use an LP system at that point is really beyond me...[/note]

-4693314276576942578:4019651812297622743.name: Get Those Machines to Work
-4693314276576942578:4019651812297622743.desc:
Most of the recipes are made in all kinds of machines. While a crafting logistics pipe works, it can only hold 1 recipe per pipe.

It is not an issue for logistics crafting tables as it can only hold one crafting table recipes, but it is wasteful to assign only one recipe for one machine.

For machines, use chassis. Preferably a higher tier. A Mk1 chassis with a crafting module is basically just a crafting logistics pipe.

You can't shift-click recipes from NEI so you have to drag the recipe from it. Don't worry, you can drag ghost items from NEI into the slots in the module to configure it.

You notice there are 3 gray slots at the right. They are for satellite logistics pipes. We will talk about it later.

Note: do NOT use the output face of the machine. The output side blocks all interactions unless you hit it with a screwdriver.

Also do NOT use auto-output, or else the machine will output the item into the pipe and the network will treat the product as an item inserted into the system rather than an item requested by the system and will send it to its storage. Every other face except the cover works.

The check mark means you have read the whole thing and should know how machine automation works using LP. The reward of this quest is the knowledge of how to automate GT machine recipes

-8602150355407157686:3774498814513663876.name: A Beginner's Guide to Particle Physics
-8602150355407157686:3774498814513663876.desc:
If you've built the Source Chamber already, you may have noticed that particles aren't produced as items, like GT++ ones are.

Instead they're transmitted through Beamline Pipes from multi to multi, similar to real life.

Each stream of particles transmitted, or "beam", has four properties:
- Particle: the type of particle carried by the beam
- Energy: the amount of energy the particles have
- Focus: out of 100, how focused the beam is
- Amount: a measure of the number of particles in the beam

Note that you can see info about a multi's input and output beams by using a Tricorder on the controller.

For the recipes you'll be interested in, i.e. the ones that actually produce items, there'll be a threshold for allowed input beam energy, a minimum focus value, and an amount value which determines recipe time (more on that in the Target Chamber quest).
Take a look some TC recipes for an example of this.

Have a photon. To hang on your wall.

-7564657505094199890:3792764068527096794.name: Manipulator Upgrades
-7564657505094199890:3792764068527096794.desc:
Now that you have a Matter Manipulator... why not make it better?

These upgrades will give huge quality of life improvements when using should you choose to craft them. 

[note]Pay attention to the applicable tier of MM before you do so![/note]

-5367828810714122460:3813996469394622463.name: Shadow Metal
-5367828810714122460:3813996469394622463.desc:
Shadow Metal is an extremely useful metal in the early game. It can be easily made via the crucible and refined once you unlock the vacuum freezer. 

It's high durability makes it a fantastic candidate for handheld tools, prospector scanners, turbines, and even wand caps later down the line.

Start off by making 5 ores, and doubling that using a macerator.

[note]Hint: You can find the research early on in the Maleficia section of the Thaumonomicon[/note]

-7449875220775355737:3843847984648504058.name: Producing Solar Panels in BULK!!
-7449875220775355737:3843847984648504058.desc:
[quest]The Solar Factory![/quest]

The structure has tiers, each of which allow greater production than the previous tier. 

Recipes in NEI display the minimum wafer tier required. 
Wafer Tiers: 

Monocrystalline
Phosphorous
Naquadah
Europium
Americium
Photonically Prepared
Photonically Enhanced

Machine parallels are based on Precise Casing Tier:

MK-I: 8x
MK-II: 16x
MK-III: 32x
MK-IV: 64x

Tier 2:

Supports Multi-Amp energy hatches
25% more outputs for every Wafer tier above the minimum required.
The bonus to outputs occurs after parallels, but cannot be greater than 100%
LV-LuV Solar Panels can be made without the previous panel, but at a higher cost.

Tier 3:

Supports Laser Energy hatches
Bonus per increased wafer tier is increased to 50%
ZPM-UV Solar Panels can be made without the previous panel, but at a higher cost.

-7026708278772253011:3895133699912977808.name: Zzzincing...
-7026708278772253011:3895133699912977808.desc:
Do you know how much Zinc you have in your body? Very little, but it's important. Now imagine it's all plasma!

This is a very fast recipe, like Niobium Plasma. The only caveat is that it uses Tritium (not Trinium), a rare isotope of Hydrogen that you can obtain from Deuterium, a less rare isotope. You can pump it directly from Neptune, through the Space Elevator or simply by centrifuging the Deuterium you already automated for Helium Plasma.

-8934580080477372197:3980240666357088953.name: Glowstone
-8934580080477372197:3980240666357088953.desc: The Glowstone Princess isn't as picky as her peers. There are no breeding requirements besides the species being Gold and Redstone. Hooray!

-8971549008568708105:4047602715113178066.name: The Factory Must Grow!
-8971549008568708105:4047602715113178066.desc:
A single stargate pair wasn't enough for you?

Well then, time to build a network.

Welcome to the post-stargate tier! 

Now that you successfully managed to make a stargate, what about crafting them in industrial quantities? Try to craft 5 pairs of gates in the least amount of time, then come in #screenshot-brag and post your time to see where your infrastructure stands in the community!

[note]If you are going for 100% questbook completion, you can choose between this quest or 'See You Next Time!', both are valid options.
Be wary that choosing one will lock you out of the other though.

Enjoy your round of Minesweeper![/note]

-5840241591017037228:4053311655056132369.name: "Semi-Stable" doing a lot of work in here
-5840241591017037228:4053311655056132369.desc:
A cell of antimatter! Contained in a cell made of matter! Surely this is safe.

Antimatter is exactly what you may imagine, the opposite of matter, for every atom in the universe, an "anti atom" exists, and when both meet...

They annihilate themselves, releasing a lot of energy!

But how could you capture this energy?

-8279404553732255962:4134900649059239447.name: Celestial Gateways
-8279404553732255962:4134900649059239447.desc:
Celestial Gateways are a bit expensive, but they provide very convenient travel within a dimension.

Shift-click with a celestial pearl on a celestial gateway to attune the pearl to that specific gateway and insert that pearl into the slot of another.

Shift when standing above a celestial gateway to get the teleportation menu. It makes sense to name the pearls in an anvil if you want to easily identify the different locations.

-8282566777789973916:4152663040910640064.name: Fancy Stripes!
-8282566777789973916:4152663040910640064.desc:
A Rocket Engine is needed to accelerate your Mothership. Each Rocket Engine consists of one Rocket Engine Jet and 1 to 10 Rocket Engine Base blocks placed in a vertical line. Each Rocket Engine Base provides 2MN of force and holds up to 10,000L of Naquadah Based Liquid Fuel Mk II.

[note]The Mothership is configured to have a fixed weight of 1500kg. So feel free to design a big and fancy spaceship. The amount of engines you need stays the same.[/note]

-8684814659604725155:4188281966690386250.name: Prismatic Gas
-8684814659604725155:4188281966690386250.desc: The Prismatic Crystal will then be processed in a Vacuum Furnace with Boron Plasma in order to successfully convert it to the highly sought after Prismatic Gas.

-7352238207613032698:4191930864154070359.name: A T0 Rocket? What?
-7352238207613032698:4191930864154070359.desc:
You can't use this rocket to go to any planet or moon and it's the most expensive one - a bad deal? Not quite! The Shuttle Rocket is used to create and access a Mothership.

The Shuttle Rocket needs the same fuel as the T8 Rocket.

[note]In case you forgot to complete any, holding the rocket in your hand will unlock all pre-requisite quests in addition to this one.[/note]

-8404600922321060154:4348276905752219314.name: Dynamism Tablets
-8404600922321060154:4348276905752219314.desc:
The Dynamism tablet is a block that simulates the functionality of a left and right-click autoclicker. It can be obtained fairly early in the game (early-mid MV), and is a useful tool for simple automation.

Upon placing, the tablet will target the block that it's facing (the direction is indicated by a small dot on the overlay) and will start once you give it an item in its slot. If it holds a block/seed/sapling, it can also place it on the block below it.

It can be configured to either left/right click and also has an option to only be active when it receives a redstone signal. Hoppers or item pipes of any sort also allow the tablet to receive items.

Note that some special mob drops or special interactions (like BM sacrificial knife) are disabled for the Dynamism tablet. However, they do work with Tinkers Tools.

[note]This item has received a rework in 2.8 and has had most of its bugs fixed. If you still encounter any bugs, feel free to report it on our GitHub page or discord server.[/note]

-5247534164092041732:4369508821844511425.name: Scanning Made Easy
-5247534164092041732:4369508821844511425.desc:
We get it; The early-game of thaumcraft sucks and you don't want to throw every one of your 1000 items on the ground and scan them. That's why we added 2 cool QoL features which makes this tedious task very quick and easy.

1. You don't actually have to throw the item on the ground. You can scan it directly from your inventory! Simply hover it over the item you want to scan, and after a short duration it will be scanned.

2. You've probably accumulated dozens of double chests full of junk that you don't want to sift through and scan, so there's a second feature now: Scanning entire chests! Simply shift right-click while hovering over a chest with your thaumometer and it'll scan EVERY item inside of the chest. Though be beware, this strong feature requires a bit of research. 
[note]To unlock the research, go to your Thaumonomicon, open "Basic Information" (the first tab), and complete this research path: Research -> Research Expertise -> Deconstruction Table -> Container Scanning[/note]

-7135739436701952877:4609943232281527501.name: Netherite Nanoparticles
-7135739436701952877:4609943232281527501.desc:
Netherite Nanoparticles can be made from Macerating your newly attained Brittle Netherite Scraps.

[note]Almost seems too easy doesn't it?[/note]

-5991978432068446918:4492407415263742930.name: More steam, more pressure!
-5991978432068446918:4492407415263742930.desc:
How do you compress things in the Steam Age? Simple, putting a lot of steam in one place, under high pressure, can apply a force to compress things...

Let's just make it bigger. With the Steam Squasher, you can have a Compressor in a much larger scale, similarly to the other Steam Multiblocks. If you feel like compressing recipes are taking too long, which they probably are, this is a good solution to your problems.

Once the multi forms, provide lots of steam to get lots of compressed items.

-8580166751420167909:4508215849502853226.name: Time to Kill (Shulker)
-8580166751420167909:4508215849502853226.desc: The Shulker can spawn in the Lich or Ghast Queen Tower in the Twilight Forest. You can also optionally obtain it's spawn egg either with the crafting recipe or through the repeatable quest.

-4917150490731446271:4854090467445001294.name: Large Molecular Assembler
-4917150490731446271:4854090467445001294.desc:
The Large Molecular Assembler is exactly how it sounds; a very quick molecular assembler with a much bigger inventory for crafting patterns. 

This can handle up to 1024 crafts per second at the maximum energy usage making it up to 100x faster than a molecular assembler. Check out the Wiki for specifics: [url]https://wiki.gtnewhorizons.com/wiki/Large_Molecular_Assembler[/url]

The LMA controller hooks up directly to your main network in order to function, and all recipes must be placed inside input buses attached to the machine in order to be recognized. Will not require an output bus.

[note]Super Buses are highly recommended![/note]

[warn]This machine can absolutely wall-share, but be careful about the placement of your input bus or all machines may not be used.[/warn]

-7261779885652482879:4638636323379825267.name: Another Digital Singularity
-7261779885652482879:4638636323379825267.desc:
You've probably drained quite a few of them at this point.

[note]Have you heard about YOTTanks?[/note]

-5548813088822417447:4668386637438996383.name: Obsidian Chest
-5548813088822417447:4668386637438996383.desc:
Combining diamond chest with obsidian allowed you to create a chest that is blast proof!

[note]Just as with the previous chests you can also upgrade with a fitting upgrade item.[/note]

-6848797731239430532:4673371915106402541.name: Compact Storage
-6848797731239430532:4673371915106402541.desc:
Now that you are starting to find more and more copper, you feel your wood chests are too small to hold all the stuff.

[note]It's time to upgrade your wooden chests to copper chests! Higher tiers of chests can be upgraded cheaply by using upgrade items, but not all tier chests can be upgraded directly this way. You can also try the "Wood to Copper Chest Upgrade", but upgrading from wood to a tiered chest will not be any cheaper.[/note]

[note]Upgraded chests cannot be connected into double chests.[/note]

-6892214430748682531:4678501939106762450.name: Stars, So Many Stars
-6892214430748682531:4678501939106762450.desc:
Eternal coils? Perfect time for stargate trophy number three.
You know the drill, you give 2 stargates' worth of stuff, you get your trophy. Simple as that.

[note]Our journey through time continues onwards, entering the UMV, aka DTPF era.

Surprisingly, it still is the year 2022, but there have been a huge amount of changes since our last stop in the UEV era. The DTPF exists now, hypogen & eternal coils included, and machine parts up to UMV thus are craftable. Wireless energy is a thing now too, both the LSC and the regular hatch kind, and AE2FC is in the pack, allowing direct fluid crafting (meaning no more volumetric flask shuffling).
The power situation hasn't changed much since the UEV era, except for dyson being even more bugged and giving free uncapped infinite power (abusing this was obviously labeled as bugabuse).
Some other new useful things are the MABS, Integrated Ore Factory, Space Elevator, UIV and UMV singleblocks, EIG, EEC, industrial & mega apiary, yottanks, stocking buses, data bank chaining and the Draconic Fusion Crafter.
The stargate's cost has now skyrocketed far more than ever before, marking the beginning of this new era of GT:NH endgame, the era of expansion.

This time around the leading GDCloud was challenged by the team Neo Caelestia, who were progressing at a staggering speed, inching ever closer to being first to gate, but ultimately weren't able to fully catch up and thus GDCloud once again was first to conquer the challenge on the 19th of November, 2022.

P.S.: You know how this works, right? Here's the list:
-PCB Factory, Component Assemblyline, AAL, Transcendent Plasma Mixer, EOH, QFT
-Multi-Amp wireless hatches
-Sub 1-tick OC, Batch Mode, inbuilt Void Protection on multis
-Level Maintainer, Stocking Hatches, Crafting Input Buses

P.P.S.: Chaotic capacitor bank? What's that?[/note]

-6124867409590611841:4752431251364726399.name: Synchrotron (No Relation to the Catalyst)
-6124867409590611841:4752431251364726399.desc:
To actually produce some light for photolithography, you'll need to accelerate your electrons in a Synchrotron. Like with the LINAC, providing it with coolant is necessary to keep it running.

You can increase the energy of the produced photons by increasing EU/t, or increasing the tier of all four Antenna Casings inside.

To improve focus, you can use a better coolant, and the output amount increases with both EU/t and antennae tier.

Yes, you need all four energy hatches.

-4764888386348873901:4771622249120549870.name: A Second Ring has Hit the Godforge
-4764888386348873901:4771622249120549870.desc:
As additional rings are placed closer to the star at the center of the Forge, the gravitational stress drastically increases on the structure. Graviton shards alleviate these stresses while also creating localized spacetime bridges to link the two rings and their modules' respective upgrades.

[note]Adding a second ring to your Godforge allows for 4 additional modules, as well as allowing you to pick a second path in the split paths part of the upgrade tree.[/note]

[note]Usage of a second ring requires the CD upgrade.[/note]

-5802810217373252190:4807853113064639940.name: AMERICA!!!!!!!!!
-5802810217373252190:4807853113064639940.desc:
United States of SMASH those particles together to initiate proper controlled fusion reactions that allow us to continue this immense powergen chain. This is Americium Plasma, remember that!

This is actually the plasma that is probably the best choice for XL Plasma Turbines as a 1-recipe powergen setup. However, compared to Helium and Tin Plasma's previous state, it loses out a lot on speed on a mk3 compact, because it doesn't have the 192x/128x parallels, not to mention its recipe time is already 8x as long as Tin for the same amount of plasma.

It will also demand huge amount of Pu-241 for a UEV/UIV base to be sustained, but this fusion chain greatly reduces the amount needed, even if both inputs actually need Pu-241.

This step takes more than half the time of the final step, so it's one of the major bottlenecks: if you upgrade the final step to a compact, you would need 37 mk3 reactors to match speed here.

-7501398759330786959:4900468570622283062.name: The Cat is Out of the Box
-7501398759330786959:4900468570622283062.desc:
After many hours of grind, blood, sweat, tears, and a little bit of transcendent metal...
You are now finally able to solve mankind's hardest puzzle ever, clicking boxes randomly.

The Uncertainty Resolution, a Dyson user's wet dream, will allow you to completely skip that annoying puzzle when you need to set some (probably a lot.) Quantum Computers up.

-6208773058821867190:4924712871570456639.name: Insane Voltage Multiblocks
-6208773058821867190:4924712871570456639.desc:
Upon reaching the land of IV machinery, you can put together even more multis and speed up your automation!

Many of the multiblocks from IV tier onwards use special alloys, which either need to be cooked like any ingots you've used before (in a Furnace or EBF), but there are also alloys which have to be made in the Alloy Blast Smelter (ABS), as a fluid, which then needs to be solidified.

The multis that need ABS alloys are further down. To unlock their quests, you will first need to craft the ABS itself. However, there is a large assortment of machines you can craft without it, just by having the respective IV singleblock equivalent and some other resources.

Those will be here... but you might be able to find some more, if you look closely through NEI. Good luck!

-6880529856280616724:5104527603717458605.name: Raw Lead Ore Exchange
-6880529856280616724:5104527603717458605.desc: You can exchange your stack of Raw Lead Ore for IC2 Lead Ore.

-7143266453897023303:5202090901729395487.name: Yet Another Singularity?!?!
-7143266453897023303:5202090901729395487.desc:
Ever wanted to order 10 million billion billion chests and noticed that your crafting storage was just not big enough?

Well, here is your solution, provided to you by the good folks over at GTNHCorp (Name Pending).

The Singularity Crafting Storage has a storage of 9,223,372,036,854,775,807 Bytes, which, if you can't read numbers, is a lot.

Enjoy crafting one :) You'll need to kill some Chaos Guardians for it.

-8885151988130024871:5227173618204954175.name: The sane option
-8885151988130024871:5227173618204954175.desc:
So you choose the sane two step processing option?

Great choice.

To get started you will need to create a Titanium tier Chemical Plant with at least HV tier machine casings. It can be HV tier casings as two HV tier energy hatches will overclock the multiblock to EV.

Once completed, place in your Borax Dust. Then in the second step feed in your Thorium Dust with some Distilled Water.

Then you have your Thorium 232 Dust, nice and easy.

-7883545633909764694:5360082876215479986.name: Netherite Scrap
-7883545633909764694:5360082876215479986.desc:
Netherite Scrap is an integral part of the Netherite refinement process and fortunately you don't need very much of it. Technically you only need two pieces of scrap, as they will constantly cycle from hot to cool while never actually being used up in the process (though, having more scrap handy could improve your setup efficiency).

You can obtain Netherite Scrap by either smelting Ancient Debris or using a Forge Hammer on it. Though considering the forge hammer offers a 25% chance at gaining an additional scrap, you would be a little crazy to choose the former.

If you're wondering where you can find Ancient Debris, try scouring the Nether. It's more likely to spawn lower near the lava, and is found sporadically like small ores are rather than being in large veins like usual GT ores. Miners can also collect it!

[warn]If you don't feel like leaving home, or are lacking blocks within your nether dimension, there is also a meteor that can alleviate your Ancient Debris woes.[/warn]

-7423471752612220255:5369318545030071754.name: Getting More Out of Your Hypogen
-7423471752612220255:5369318545030071754.desc:
Once you get your first Hypogen from Fusion, you can easily duplicate it in your DTPF.

It is a loop, though, so be cautious.

-5111612769669308238:5386410408341424025.name: Trigger: Electric Boots of the Traveller Skip

-6351818268137717740:5390876163414510125.name: Iron Shulker Box
-6351818268137717740:5390876163414510125.desc:
The portable equivalent of the Iron Barrel.

Has 54 slots.

[note]Can be Dyed![/note]

-5457259343752885948:5408979075351005993.name: Charm of Dislocation
-5457259343752885948:5408979075351005993.desc: They have limited durability. So either put them on a pedestal to avoid durability loss, or use a thaumic restorer.

-6880732551191991212:5481759660087264379.name: Check Your Warp For Free!
-6880732551191991212:5481759660087264379.desc:
Don't want to spend your Salis Mundus on Litmus Paper anymore? This device can significantly reduce your Litmus Paper usage!

While holding this item, you gain a HUD Icon on the top left of your screen, which tells you how much warp you have. It does not tell you the exact warp values, but it helps you estimate it.

Here's how to read it:
Your Permanent Warp is displayed as a dark purple bar
Your Normal Warp is displayed as a light purple bar
Your Temporary Warp is displayed as a pink bar

The bar is full at 100 total warp.

-5588321033523610480:5482675134375415055.name: Let this Sink in
-5588321033523610480:5482675134375415055.desc:
A well organized storage system is crucial for a logistics system.

With the ability to use modules through a chassis, we can now prepare for storage modules.

Logistics Pipes uses ItemSink modules to assign storage spaces.

This ItemSink modules can be used in 2 ways:

1. Assign the storage of a connected inventory with at most 9 different kinds of items by setting 9 items as filter on the module.

2. Assign a connected inventory as a default route. The default route is a destination for items that have no other valid storage spaces.

Note: remember to always check if the default route has additional spaces because items that are stuck in the pipes without a destination will eventually YEET themselves out of the pipes.

-8466584755593206866:5547747616513607281.name: Cards for AE2 Nerds!
-8466584755593206866:5547747616513607281.desc:
[quest]Equal Distribution, Fake Crafting, Locking, and Advanced Blocking Cards![/quest]

Equal Distribution Card:

The Equal Distribution Card will evenly divide a cell's capacity between types or partitions.

Fake Crafting Card: 

The Fake Crafting Card will tell your ME System to complete a craft without expecting the final resulting item. 

This can be handy for creating fake patterns for entire multiblocks or setups by collecting the individual items needed in one craft.

The card can only be inserted into:

ME Dual Interface
ME Interface
P2P Tunnel - ME Dual Interface 

Locking Card: 

The Locking Card allows an interface to optionally block new crafts from being started for one of the following conditions:

While Redstone is low
While Redstone is high
After a craft has been pushed, until a redstone pulse is received
After a craft has been pushed, until the results have returned to the same interface

Advanced Blocking Card:

The Advanced Blocking Card is able to ignore non-consumables in a subnet for more complicated automations. 

In a standard subnet, where two interfaces are facing each other, the Advanced Blocking Card is to be placed on the subnet interface.

-4815840969987309766:5764157890012922125.name: Handpicking Crops is So Old School
-4815840969987309766:5764157890012922125.desc:
By making a scythe you are now able to clear 3x3 blocks of vegetation, and to harvest 5x5 tiles of crops! The harvesting ability works on most non-magical crops, including IC2 crops! Keep in mind this scythe will harvest IC2 crops even if they are not fully mature.

The quest should accept the tool whatever materials you used.

-5702321633427835969:5596010397396846071.name: Trigger: Boots of the Traveller Skip

-6752762253121630907:5617954830618019035.name: Boronic Fusion
-6752762253121630907:5617954830618019035.desc:
This plasma needs Helium Plasma to be crafted. That's right, this entire powergen chain builds on top of Helium Plasma!

The Boron Plasma step is much slower than the Helium one, so if you match the number of reactors and their tier, you will end up with a large excess of Helium Plasma. As you know, it's very useful for power in Large Plasma Turbines, so you could use this excess to power all the other reactors. As you scale up, however, this alone will probably not be enough.

You will need 3.75 reactors with this recipe to feed 1 reactor with the next step.

-5362928539393889721:5634689188638902693.name: More Health
-5362928539393889721:5634689188638902693.desc:
No matter how much of a crack shot you become it doesn't help when your twitchy fingers shoot your crossbow before your eyes can notice the tell-tale red lines on one particular type of spider's body. Usually incredible amounts of pain follow...

With your new wand you are able to craft Red Heart Canisters. A total of ten of them can be put in their own dedicated inventory slot, increasing your maximum health by one heart per.

It might not be enough, but if it ends up making the difference between standing upright and standing horizontally in a box, you'll be thankful you made these things.

-6442987415315414167:5689557153293549604.name: A Pechuliar Merchant
-6442987415315414167:5689557153293549604.desc:
During your travels, you've heard about a forest filled to the brim with magic. In that forest, there is a rumor about an interesting little fellow who can trade magical artifacts, including infused shards! Supposedly, they scour the world for gems and gold, but are cold to wanderers who have no valuables to their name.

You wonder if you can find this merchant and obtain their wares. If only there was a tool that could help find this... "Magical Forest".

[note]Note: This quest accepts meeting any type of Pech, not just Pech Foragers.[/note]

-4723838568215204215:5999625115269350536.name: Constructing Additional Pylons!
-4723838568215204215:5999625115269350536.desc:
[quest]Advanced MagLev Pylon III (EV)[/quest]

The EV Pylon has a 48 block radius (97x97x97 cube centered around the pylon)

Radius is halved if the pylon is unpowered. 

[note]The Protoss would be very happy with you[/note]

-5562896910886444976:6007149920671187507.name: No, it's not a Typo
-5562896910886444976:6007149920671187507.desc:
Stabilizing the neutron star of the Godforge was successful, but now you need something new to extract the power out of it into something usable. Your experiments lead you to using the newly discovered Mellion with a Transcendent Metal Nanite to create what seems like a crystal seed of some type, which exhibits perfect thermal conductance.

Processing this seed further into a solution, you realize you can grow this crystal into a slurry-like solution, which you decide to name [note]Phonon Transfer Medium[/note]. This incredible material displays exactly the properties you were looking for, and decide that now you can move forward with the second module of the Godforge.

-6022104266947009874:6020452548092775746.name: My Eyes Hurt! #1
-6022104266947009874:6020452548092775746.desc: Finally, you are ready to assemble these new circuits. This is a UV-tier circuit.

-7440565615906063856:6029228260296052268.name: Planar Gateways
-7440565615906063856:6029228260296052268.desc: A planar gateway from Thaumic Horizons lets you travel to a pocket dimension. Setting up multiple gateways (up to 4) to the pocket dimension even allows for travel to other dimensions!

-5633785243568862283:6030998045467231653.name: Permanent Offhand!
-5633785243568862283:6030998045467231653.desc:
With the release of version 2.8 of GTNH, the modern offhand slot has been backported and is available for every player. 

With this, we say goodbye to the Battlegear slots of before. The three slots on either side of your hotbar, default key "G", are no longer!

This feature also works with any item that opens a GUI, like a backpack for example. This makes inventory management easier and helps with certain tedious tasks.

Default Keybind to swap between mainhand and offhand: F

[warn]Any items that were in the Battlegear slots should return to your inventory or dropped on the ground if your inventory is full.[/warn]

[note]You can also toggle various Torch Tweaks in Backhand's mod client configs. They are disabled by default, but you may find them useful if you love holding torches in your offhand.[/note]

-4905890280735412841:6031686481776429608.name: Magnetic Monopole Matter
-4905890280735412841:6031686481776429608.desc:
With total mastery of the Forge of the Gods achieved, it is possible to begin a new universe-spanning initiative. It is now possible to quantize and extract graviton shards for use outside the Forge in powerful new technological endeavors; produce the most exotic plasmas beyond merely periodic elements; and most importantly, begin to understand the immense power of magmatter, a form of matter made entirely of magnetic monopoles with density and stability billions of times that of conventional bosonic matter. It is with this development you realize that the completion of the Forge was not the end goal, but merely a stepping stone to universal transcendence.

[note]Required for UXV components, Magmatter is the second material the Heliofusion Exoticizer can create, and will require a second module. Read the Godforge Information in the UI for more information on how to automate this.[/note]

[note]The creation of Magmatter requires the END upgrade.[/note]

[note]Congrats! You can now move on to the UXV tier![/note]

-4762573495702958200:5766194243726952453.name: Need More Sugar?
-4762573495702958200:5766194243726952453.desc:
With Briar starting to consume you might also want to increase your sugar production.

Sweeds are planted on grass, not farmland, and will spread to propagate themselves. Once fully matured they can be harvested for sugar as well as sugar cane.

-5622946374684694237:5859665622137454743.name: Assembling on Space Steroids
-5622946374684694237:5859665622137454743.desc: Has 64 parallels and consumes ~30b EU/t per module, expensive to run but absolutely worth it.

-5398881678143504386:5905308870348325553.name: Time to Kill (Rabbit)
-5398881678143504386:5905308870348325553.desc: It's a shame to kill something so adorable... oh well, do it anyway.

-7779649412005111278:5907211019893426057.name: Raw Coal Ore Exchange
-7779649412005111278:5907211019893426057.desc: You can exchange your stack of Raw Coal Ore for vanilla Coal Ore.

-7768747276085375941:5971863808575554746.name: IV 64A Hatches
-7768747276085375941:5971863808575554746.desc: The final multi-amp hatches for IV, 64A!

-8598415503288479283:6307540442977225447.name: Steel Chest?
-8598415503288479283:6307540442977225447.desc: While being significantly more expensive than a gold chest, the steel chest has less capacity but it can be used in some specialized crafting recipes.

-5732897673112409281:6322673158027823815.name: Synthetic Elven Gateway
-5732897673112409281:6322673158027823815.desc:
The Synthetic Elven Gateway is an advanced and easily automatable version of the normal Elven Gateway. As a result it is much quicker, less TPS intensive, and AE2 compatible.

Much like the Mana Fountain, the controller can be given mana via a mana spreader or spark & item input can happen from any face, while item output is restricted to the bottom.

[note]While running, this uses more mana passively than a normal Elven Gateway does, so be sure you have adequate mana production![/note]

-7973202373084553817:6327679129227052174.name: The future is here!
-7973202373084553817:6327679129227052174.desc: EFR adds with it vanilla Barrels (not to be confused with JABBA barrels). These are essentially like chests, but they can be placed next to each other and opened with a block above them. And you can upgrade them! Great for those compact machine setups.

-6601301260503824958:6063490287807712670.name: Intradimensional Input buses
-6601301260503824958:6063490287807712670.desc:
This Special bus is rather pricey however it will allow all items that are in the bus to be accessible in all other linked buses in the same dimension.

This would allow multiple machines to work from the same input of items.

While holding a data stick the configuration settings can be copied with a left-click and pasted with a right-click on the bus.

-8955940478007720167:6076881714297651207.name: A Modern Technology
-8955940478007720167:6076881714297651207.desc:
Concrete. Eh sorry, Hempcrete! A new modern technology brought to you via the GTNH Chisel mod. All 16 colors.

There are a lot of other nice blocks in Chisel. Just type "@chisel" in NEI and look around.

-6086424367920924213:6088557848748770975.name: Time to Request
-6086424367920924213:6088557848748770975.desc:
Your system now has the capability of providing items for requests, time to request items.

This Request Logistics Pipe can send out requests that, if the network has items that can fulfill the requests, send the item to the pipe.

Attach an inventory to it so that when items reach the request logistics pipe, they are stored in an inventory and don't get yeeted out.

-6955704912784996817:6090167015894894567.name: Time to See The Process
-6955704912784996817:6090167015894894567.desc:
Want to see how the system is handling the request and fix it when you find things get stuck? Here is the upgrade for you.

The Crafting Monitoring Upgrade can let you view the current progress of the request. So if you find your crafting request is taking an abnormally long time and nothing is crafted by your machines, you may want to take a look here.

It can be applied to your Logistics Request Table.

-6585475866071969942:6094344093624257072.name: See You Lather
-6585475866071969942:6094344093624257072.desc:
Just in time for the huge number of crystal rods you'll need to get your Applied Energistics system up and running, the Industrial Precision Lathe!

The number of recipes that can be processed in parallel by the IPL depends on the item pipe casing.
(Parallel = Item Pipe Casing Tier * 8)

Additionally, it has a 300% speed boost on all recipes compared to the singleblock of that voltage and only consumes 80% of the EU/t normally required

-6032059115700228569:6173848888483005422.name: EVEN EVEN BETTER CHASSIS
-6032059115700228569:6173848888483005422.desc:
What? You need better chassis already? Need even more recipe slots?

Here is the Chassis Mk4. It holds 4 modules.

-8402215780395772114:6211058784429555895.name: Raw Lapis Ore Exchange
-8402215780395772114:6211058784429555895.desc: You can exchange your stack of Raw Lapis Ore for vanilla Lapis Ore.

-6298089791773258108:6234173345624051259.name: Universal pickaxe, Vajra
-6298089791773258108:6234173345624051259.desc:
This tool can mine blocks instantly, including GregTech blocks or cables. 

Using left-click will mine blocks as usual, right-clicking will harvest blocks 1 by 1. Enabling silk touch will work for both. 

[note]To enable silk touch mode Shift+Right Click air while holding the Vajra.[/note]

[warn]If you already have a Vajra built before GTNH version 2.8, you can put it in the crafting grid to swap it to the new version[/warn]

-6278340775631964090:6234143705770446233.name: Sunnarium
-6278340775631964090:6234143705770446233.desc: Not only does this bee produce more Glowstone than its parent species, but it's also capable of producing Sunnarium. However, this requires some technical progress: to breed this bee, you will need to place a Superconducting Coil Block beneath it.

-6772057045989436864:6240105828909796885.name: Using Light to Compute
-6772057045989436864:6240105828909796885.desc: Carefully treating raw computer parts with purified water allows you to make optically enhanced chips. These use light waves to do computations at a speed you previously couldn't imagine. Making them is quite an involved process however.

-5681445710078694276:6362508535151543876.name: Steam Blender?
-5681445710078694276:6362508535151543876.desc:
Why use fancy wiring and circuitry to blend dusts together when you can do the same thing with steam and pistons? The Steam Blender is the largest of these Steam Multiblocks and can handle your mixing needs for a while, having more parallel than an LV singleblock Mixer.

[note]This Multiblock can only process recipes up to LV tier.[/note]

-8548775180619194411:6370448498489247032.name: Steam Fusing?
-8548775180619194411:6370448498489247032.desc:
Singleblock Alloy Smelters not fast enough for you? Look no further than the Steam Fuser. This will make light work of your alloy smelter tasks at a fraction of the steam cost and a much faster speed. 
(Check out the tooltip for more info!)

While the NEI requirements show borosilicate glass, you can substitute any HV tier glass in it's place like warded glass, quite clear glass, or fused quartz. If you end up using borosilicate; boron can be obtained from electrolyzing borax.

[note]Will only process up to LV tier recipes[/note]

-6963947838860379704:6380602928249523144.name: My Eyes Hurt! #3
-6963947838860379704:6380602928249523144.desc: The optical supercomputer is the third optical circuit. It is a UEV-tier circuit

-9080536097015359642:6385984193999818429.name: Assembling on Steroids
-9080536097015359642:6385984193999818429.desc:
It has 16 parallels and can utilize advanced superconductors for improved yields in optical part recipes.

[note]You can't create the Ultimate Battery in one step yet-that's much further down the line.[/note]

-8810543536998436147:6393847662955875738.name: Crayon and Melon
-8810543536998436147:6393847662955875738.desc:
The Godforge will require new materials with the correct properties to stabilize a neutron star. With your new Transcendent Plasma Mixer and MK5 Fusion Reactor, you learn of a new material which may be suitable, which you name [note]Creon[/note].

This material is made as a plasma, and must be cooled alongside an extremely sturdy material. You try a curious mixture of dusts, which you decide to name [note]Mellion[/note].

[note]These materials may also be suitable for components you need many of, you may realize UIV components seem to handle these two materials quite well...[/note]

-5079329377019678961:6399820238912438369.name: Netherrack Froth
-5079329377019678961:6399820238912438369.desc:
To get Netherrack Froth, you can combine your milling products with your Nefarious Oil in a Flotation Cell. 

[note]It would be wise to make a robust setup for this.[/note]

-5575624123602641916:6411465645269994516.name: The Quest for Holy Water
-5575624123602641916:6411465645269994516.desc:
You got to take a well deserved break from the waterline in UHV, but now that you are going to be making optical circuits, your Grade 6 Purified Water will no longer be enough. Using the Degasser, you can remove all the leftover decontaminants from previous processes and make even more pure water, pure enough for Optical Circuits.

The tooltip and list of requirements looks intimidating. Try breaking it down into small, digestible units of logic and you will quickly arrive at a solution.

-6502072158014938432:6427254672927180793.name: Inserting Fluids
-6502072158014938432:6427254672927180793.desc:
Sometimes you insert fluid in the system. You need something to get the fluid into the correct buffer other than inserting the fluid into the buffer manually.

There are 2 pipes that can do the job: transfer fluid into a tank connected to a fluid basic pipe allocated to said fluid.

1. Logistics Fluid Extractor Pipe. It extracts fluid from connected buffer to the correct big storage tank. It doesn't require a pump but it is slower.

2. Logistics Fluid Insertion Pipe. It does not pull fluids from tanks actively, requiring a GT pump if you are using GT tanks, but it can send fluids faster.

Take a pick :)

-7118851089254229135:6530486220488721281.name: High Energy Laser Purification
-7118851089254229135:6530486220488721281.desc: For even more pure water, you will need to use strong lasers to precisely bombard the water and remove impurities. As usual with the waterline, this multiblock presents you with a complex automation puzzle to solve.

-8406688982659812687:6574493569017332361.name: Time to Kill (Husk)
-8406688982659812687:6574493569017332361.desc: A Husk is a variant of Zombie that spawns in deserts! They attack like Zombies, except they inflict hunger and refuse to burn in the sunlight.

-5095508056809418717:6871186703039940952.name: The Final Frontier!
-5095508056809418717:6871186703039940952.desc:
With the Mothership (see the Space Race tab for how to build one) you can visit the truly last system: the Amun-Ra system. It has six planets and moons you can visit, each with at least one unique ore vein.

Anubis
Infinity Catalyst vein (Neutronium, Adamantium, Infinity Catalyst, Bedrockium)

Horus
Cosmic Neutronium vein (Neutronium, Cosmic Neutronium, Black Plutonium, Bedrockium)

Maahes
Naquadria vein (Naquadah, Enriched Naquadah, Naquadria, Trinium)

Mehen Belt
Awakened Draconium vein (Draconium, Draconium, Awakened Draconium, Nether Star)

Neper
Dilithium (Dilithium, Dilithium, Mysterious Crystal, Vinteum)

Seth
Raw Tengam (Raw Tengam, Raw Tengam, Electrotine, Samarium)

Raw Tengam is the vein you will want the most, as you can process Raw Tengam into Attuned Tengam, which is the UEV+ replacement for Magnetic Samarium. On Horus and Neper generate Certus Quartz veins (Certus Quartz, Certus Quartz, Charged Certus Quartz, Quartz Sand) as well I can't imagine why you would still need that though.

-6114805307354858601:6889964143272346349.name: Forestry Core Block #2
-6114805307354858601:6889964143272346349.desc: The upgraded casing for Forestry, used in multiple recipes for endgame Gendustry items and the Rainmaker.

-8917357558952918000:6633304091534312144.name: Taking Things Apart
-8917357558952918000:6633304091534312144.desc:
You probably haven't thought about the extractor in a while. Is your steam extractor still collecting dust somewhere? Well, if you do find yourself needing to extract things quick, (processing industrial quantities of flowers, maybe?) pick up the Dissection Apparatus.

[note]This multi gets additional parallels based on tier of item pipe casing, so use the best one you can get![/note]

-6508425876028650542:6644574769448306261.name: Netherrack Milling
-6508425876028650542:6644574769448306261.desc:
With the Netherite line comes the first mandatory usage of the Isamill Grinding Machine, which you will need to create Milled Netherrack. You will require a lot of this so be prudent in keeping up with your netherrack and milling ball production. 

For netherrack, the best methods of production are through the rock breaker using glowstone dust, or through compressing netherrack dust that you may have obtained a stash of through mining.

For the milling balls, you have two options:

- Soapstone -> Cheaper, 50% as effective as Alumina
- Alumina -> More Expensive, 2x as effective as Soapstone

-6648564718221428813:6675055756905956463.name: Neutronium Compressor
-6648564718221428813:6675055756905956463.desc:
In order to compress infinity catalysts and singularities, you'll need the strongest compressor yet: the Neutronium Compressor. This multiblock channels and controls extreme amounts of pressure through carefully calibrated Active Neutronium Casings, but the sheer magnitude of pressure is too much to produce blocks or superdense plates, as any regular material inserted into the device will be compressed down to a singularity. More advanced singularities should be possible in theory, but you'll need something even stronger...

[note]Note that singularity recipes require extreme amounts of items! Consider using Super Buses or ME Stocking Input Buses to fit everything in there.[/note]

-5612826465399047400:6916067238181487784.name: Niobiumization
-5612826465399047400:6916067238181487784.desc:
Do you remember Niobium-Titanium? This time, it's just Niobium! Just kidding, Titanium's coming up in a special form...

Both this and the Zinc Plasma recipe are very fast, so you won't need more than 1 reactor unless your scale is very large. Upgrade later as needed, use a mk2 or even mk3 for now.

-7053414737734297359:6809780525344965180.name: Convergence
-7053414737734297359:6809780525344965180.desc:
Running your Dimensionally Transcendent Plasma Forge for an extended period [note](8 hours)[/note] allows the Multidimensional Spaces to align perfectly.

With your newly acquired technology, you can now tap into these spaces in perfect sync, enabling your plasma forges to operate at incredible speeds.

The Transdimensional Alignment Matrix allows the DTPF to run with Perfect Overclocks. To achieve this, you need a full discount, and the extra power cost is offset by using more of the same catalyst.

Overall, it is more efficient and totally worth it.

This process is extremely catalyst-hungry. Ensure you're producing enough to sustain it.

For recipes without a catalyst, you must specify the catalyst in the GUI by right-clicking the Convergence button, otherwise it will default to Crude.[/note]

[note]Math for the curious:

To clear up what exactly happens in the background, here's an explanation on how the extra catalyst values are calculated using an example:

The example recipe of choice is the molten neutronium recipe using prosaic catalyst, running at 64A UMV (8,589,934,592 EU/t).
The recipe uses 14,753L of Prosaic catalyst and 36,484,545,600 EU per recipe without OCs or the catalyst discount. With the discount, the catalyst amount gets cut in half, meaning 7,376.5L of catalyst, which are rounded to 7,376L, and due to the 64A UMV the machine is supplied with the recipe overclocks 3 times, meaning each recipe actually uses 36,484,545,600 * 2^3 = 291,876,364,800 EU.

Knowing the amount of OCs and the base voltage of the recipe, the difference of the needed EU per recipe with and without perfect OC can be calculated, that being 291,876,364,800 - 36,484,545,600 = 255,391,819,200 extra EU due to imperfect OCs.
To get the value of needed extra catalyst, this extra EU value has to be divided by the energy density of the relevant catalyst, prosaic in this case.

The division equates to 255,391,819,200 EU / 66,768,460 EU/L = 3,825.037 L, rounded to 3,825L extra prosaic catalyst per recipe. For the final step, this value has to be multiplied by 0.5 as it's affected by the discount, meaning the total extra catalyst that gets added to the recipe is 3,825L * 0.5 = 1,912.5 L, rounded to 1,912L.

To summarize it all in a formula:
Amount extra catalyst per recipe = (B * ((2^x) - 1))/2L
where:
B is base total EU of the recipe
x is the number of overclocks
L is the EU/L of the relevant catalyst [/note]

-5122202840608450070:6838269211896792715.name: The one book to rule them all
-5122202840608450070:6838269211896792715.desc:
This Tome can store multiple documentation books from other mods. It will be empty when crafted, but you can add books by combining it with the desired book in a crafting grid.

Right-clicking with the Tome in hand will open an interface showing all the added books; clicking on a book will transform the tome into the selected book. To revert it back to the Tome, left-click while sneaking.

To retrieve a stored book, transform the Tome into the desired book and throw it away while sneaking - this will drop the selected book and leave the tome in your inventory.

[warn]Some warnings:

The extended version of the Book of Biomes from Witchery is not compatible with this tome.

You should not throw it through the Botania portal. The elves might steal your Tome and return only their own copy of the Lexica Botania.[/warn]

-6603481604534581008:7158790621499769954.name: Hundreds of Thousands of eV
-6603481604534581008:7158790621499769954.desc:
A Linear Accelerator (LINAC) can be used to boost the energy of your beam, provided the beam's particles are charged. You'll need to constantly provide it with coolant for it to run, otherwise you'll have maintenance issues every time it runs dry.

Output energy can be increased by increasing EU/t (scales with the cbrt) or increasing length (scales linearly). The latter also decreases focus, however.

Focus in turn can be improved by using a better/lower temperature coolant (options listed on tooltip).

Note that Amount remains unchanged.

-5659562005976529540:7171649292774755852.name: Matter Manipulator MKI
-5659562005976529540:7171649292774755852.desc:
The MKI is where you really start unlocking the potential of the Matter Manipulator. This new one has a 64 Block range and a 64 Block/Second speed limit.

Unlike it's prototype predecessor, this now has 3 new modes made available to you:

- Geometry: Places standard blocks in a selected and configurable shape.

- Cable: Allows you to place AE and GT cables & pipes in lines (and connecting them automatically).

- Exchange: Allows you to swap large swaths of blocks like the TC Equal Trade Focus.

Additionally, it can now connect to your AE network for automatically transferring items and liquids. You can link the tool in your security terminal and use it while within wireless range.

When something is placed into the world, the tool will pull from inventories in this order:
1 - ME system
2 - Player's inventory
3 - Uplink

When something is removed from the world, the tool will push into inventories in this order:
1 - ME system
2 - Uplink
3 - Player's inventory
4 - The Ground (Items Only)

[note]This also comes stock with the ability to remove blocks, so there is no need for another excavation upgrade.[/note]

-5188884833545587110:6941466327918137169.name: Gold Shulker Box
-5188884833545587110:6941466327918137169.desc:
The portable equivalent of the Gold Barrel.

Has 81 slots.

[note]Can be Dyed![/note]

-5190000451783132175:6984248977060151638.name: Laputa I
-5190000451783132175:6984248977060151638.desc: The item when used will raise a sphere of land into the air, centered on the selected block. The radius of the sphere and the height elevated are determined by the Shard Power. The process is not instant, and instead will move each block at a time until every block within a radius is moved. Blocks that rely on walls or floors, such as torches and crops, will drop in the process, as the required support is not moved alongside.

-9038089047233248346:7014754550049491914.name: Pyrotheum
-9038089047233248346:7014754550049491914.desc:
Blazing Pyrotheum is needed in large quantities to satisfy the unquenchable thirst of your Volcani. This Bee produces Pyrotheum Dust directly - all you need to do is fluid-extract it (after reaching this point in the breeding chain, of course).

Breed these bees from Energy and Redstone Bees. They aren't picky about conditions, requiring only Hellish temperature. Yay!

-8715851602927843049:7139951254313780517.name: Finally, Some Real Power!
-8715851602927843049:7139951254313780517.desc:
The Energy Tunnel Manipulator Upgrade is incredibly useful for the heavy potential Matter Manipulator usage in UHV+. 

You can now link directly with either the Quantum Link or a Laser Target Hatch for much quicker recharging. No need to rely on those slow wireless chargers any longer!

-5813797741888729661:7141268147557583179.name: Cheaper LuV Circuits
-5813797741888729661:7141268147557583179.desc: The crystal living chips are more efficient and will make your wetware processors cheaper!

-5847927107856321162:7244653316249437730.name: Advanced Assembly Line
-5847927107856321162:7244653316249437730.desc:
This is the advanced assembly line from GigaGramFab.

It supports item pipelining. That is, it will mimic a real assembly line by consuming ingredients one by one instead of all at start. In effect, it offers a parallelism up to however many item inputs this recipe requires. You can think of an advanced assembly line as a collection of slices which are capable of processing each step independently from other slices. It will start processing once the input bus contents align with any stored data stick. The first slice will consume the input in Bus #1. After (recipe time/number of inputs) time, the first slice's work is concluded and will start the second slice. At the same time, first slice will look for input in input bus #1. If there are still enough input there slice #1 will start working again.

The terminal slice (the n-th slice, where n is number of item input in recipe) will put the recipe output in output bus when it has concluded his work. Whenever a non-terminal slice finished its work, it will try to pass the work onto next slice. If the next slice cannot find the materials in its input bus, the just-finished slice will remain in [warn]STUCK[/warn] state and hang the assembly line. To help locate these [warn]STUCK[/warn] assembly lines, the controller's front face will have its status light turned orange.

The EU/t cost of this machine is number of slices active multiplied by the original recipe EU/t. [warn]STUCK[/warn] slices do not consume power. It will use the worst energy supplying hatch's input voltage for recipe tier calculation and normal imperfect overclock. With exotic energy hatches, it can overclock beyond usual voltage tier, but will consume even more power than usual imperfect overclock. Every laser overclock will 0.3 to power exponent. 1 laser overclock will have 50% recipe time and use 430% power. 2 laser overclocks will have 25% recipe time and use 1978% power. Will not overclock beyond 1 tick. Machine first tries to parallelize, then normal imperfect overclock, then laser overclock.

-5376193048649833794:7263787550099521813.name: Lootbag Uptiering
-5376193048649833794:7263787550099521813.desc:
In GTNH, the lootbags are quite useful tools for boosting your resources. There are a wide variety of lootbag types, and those types all have upgrade paths to get better resources.

There are two paths you can take when it comes to upgrading your lootbags, you can either enchant it with fortune, or you can upgrade the bag itself. Enchanting the lootbag with fortune will increase the chances of more rare drops being given to you on opening, while upgrading the bag itself will change the item pool to that of the upgraded bag. Notably, if you uptier the bag itself, it will cost 3 of the previous bag tier, so make sure it's worthwhile to upgrade before you do so!

If you're looking to maximize your advantage it's recommended you both uptier your lootbag AND apply the fortune upgrade. 

[note]Be sure to use NEI to see all of this information. Use 'U' on your lootbag and you will be able to see the potential drops, the drop chances based on fortune levels, and you will be able to see recipes for uptiering the bag.[/note]

-6879337197971995339:7290694029660342127.name: It's DA BEST
-6879337197971995339:7290694029660342127.desc:
You still need MORE recipe slots for the crafting modules?

This one will cost you TITANIUM. Are you sure about that?

Yes? OK...

Here is the final tier of chassis: Chassis Mk5. Instead of incrementing the number of modules it can hold by 1 compared to the last tier, it straight up doubles the slots. Hopefully you think it is worth it.

-5078863766116826815:7309218930086988029.name: Having trouble finding Botania mushrooms?
-5078863766116826815:7309218930086988029.desc: Why not exchange a few coins to save yourself the time of combing the Twilight forest for Shimmering mushrooms.

-4993634693115988771:7312870939493747973.name: Concentrated Samarium
-4993634693115988771:7312870939493747973.desc:
Precipitate samarium ions with oxalic acid. Samarium oxalate is then washed with hydrochloric acid; you get Impure Samarium Chloride as a result. This Samarium chloride dust is the base material for the extraction of samarium.

To actually get Samarium Dust out of this, there are two methods, one is for IV, the other a bit later in LuV.

-8838176938353182973:7491993009597530814.name: Playing with Colors!
-8838176938353182973:7491993009597530814.desc:
Multiblock machines enforce input separation based on hatch color. Inputs from Input Buses and Input Hatches will only interact if they share the same color. Un-dyed inputs act as wildcards compatible with any color.

Color can be applied using a Spray Can and removed with a Spray Can Solvent. An Infinite Spray Can becomes available later in progression.

Now go have fun!!!

-6185205082821488463:7437335273039154651.name: Shulker Upgrades
-6185205082821488463:7437335273039154651.desc:
Shulker boxes in need of an upgrade? Now that you're in MV and have access to Crystalline Pink Slime dust they can be! No need to gather all new shells, there are 9 upgrade items available. They will preserve the inventory of your shulker so there is no need to empty it beforehand.

Available Upgrades:
Vanilla -> Copper
Vanilla -> Iron
Copper -> Iron
Copper -> Silver
Iron -> Gold
Silver -> Gold
Gold -> Diamond
Diamond -> Crystal
Diamond -> Obsidian

-6820538323233352514:-275809407238584432.name: What Do I Use This Stuff On?
-6820538323233352514:-275809407238584432.desc:
White Dwarf Matter, your first main EOH material! I must be able to craft all sorts of cool endgame things with this... right?

[note]Currently, besides EOH casing upgrades, White Dwarf Matter is not used anywhere on its own, often paired with Black Dwarf Matter or other later materials. Save it up for now and keep upgrading that EOH![/note]

-6318031316370662851:-225740878238691949.name: Keeping Out the Riff-Raff
-6318031316370662851:-225740878238691949.desc:
You're starting to get tired of having to build everything like some kind of fortress just to make sure no unwanted guests come in. Sure, that's just the nature of living in a world where infinite hoards of restless undead haunt every other dark corner, but is having a secure entryway that isn't conveniently door-shaped too much to ask?

Not anymore. Paving Stone of Warding, assuming nothing sits on top of it, will project a two block tall invisible force-field above itself that block non-player mobs from passing through, at least the common riff-raff. As a bonus spiders cannot climb the force-field, so no need for overhangs to keep them out too.

That said, since the force-field cannot tell an arrow fired by you from one fired at you, mundane objects will still pass through regardless. And the force-field does as much to block line of sight as the term invisible would suggest.

Of course, you're not concerned about that part. Being able to shoot things with your crossbow while they can't reach you is very much in your favor, all told.

-6186301913252184525:-221049436640951009.name: Harnessing Chaos
-6186301913252184525:-221049436640951009.desc:
You've mastered antimatter production, but raw antimatter alone won't run your machines. To turn that potential into unparalleled power, it's time to [warn]harness the chaos[/warn] itself!

[quest]Introducing the Shielded Lagrangian Annihilation Matrix![/quest]

The SLAM creates raw energy by reacting the Semi-Stable Antimatter with normal matter in a controlled environment.

Every cycle, the generator will react all antimatter and matter in hatches instantly, converting it all into energy directly. The EU output is based on the equal amounts of antimatter and matter annihilated. Therefore, imbalance between the amounts will waste your precious energy.

Depending on the matter used to annihilate, the antimatter amount gets an exponent applied to it, directly increasing the amount of energy produced from 1L of antimatter - this means the more you annihilate in one go, the more efficient it is!

The maximum EU for a cycle is limited by the capacity of all laser source hatches on the structure (limited to 64), even on wireless mode.

[note]It can't output more than 9.22e18 EU in a cycle, or just below 43 16M UXV Laser Sources (If you're crazy enough for it)
[/note]

The Formula and the exponents for each of the possible matters are:

Generated EU = (Antimatter^exponent) * 1,000,000,000,000

Molten Copper - 1.00
Molten Superconductor Base UIV - 1.02
Molten Superconductor Base UMV - 1.03

-9064439369025459403:-199482370913580560.name: Dimensional Breach Imminent
-9064439369025459403:-199482370913580560.desc:
At last, you have done it. The DTPF is a mighty multiblock fueled by large amounts of power and catalyst. Running it constantly for 8 hours or longer reduces catalyst consumption by 50%, so you will want to find a way to automate this to save on expensive catalyst.

You will need 2112 coil blocks in total. Accepted coil tiers are

- Awakened Draconium
- Infinity
- Hypogen
- Eternal

While you can start with Awakened Draconium coils, you will need at least infinity coils to make tesseracts for UIV, so it may be worth it to skip to those immediately

[note]Perhaps it can be used to bake exotic cookies?[/note]

-7597946804573803113:-182234636254362673.name: Preparin' for Requestin'
-7597946804573803113:-182234636254362673.desc:
Logistics Pipes have automation capability in place, but first, it needs to know what inventory that items inside can be used for requests.

The Provider module does this job nicely. When you open the interface of the module, there is a 3*3 grid. You can pick what items that the module can provide, or you can leave it empty as "everything in the inventory can be provided for requests".

-5839827992902048320:-166326957975844254.name: Ultimate Parallelization...
-5839827992902048320:-166326957975844254.desc: Allows for parallelization of a single interface, you don't have to copy patterns for multiple interfaces anymore.

-6902980861914057189:-157238644386021067.name: Advanced Autoclaving
-6902980861914057189:-157238644386021067.desc:
In LuV, you can make the Industrial Autoclave. This is a huge multiblock with many scaling factors - it is also extremely powerful. You'll definitely want to pick one of these up to process crystal chips quickly for the crystal circuit line.

[note]Coils, pipe casings, and item pipe casings are all extremely important to this multi's scaling. Use the best ones you have![/note]

-5753871526049634361:-139068609484536132.name: UEV Energy Hatch
-5753871526049634361:-139068609484536132.desc: Another tier, another energy hatch. You can use these to overclock your assembly lines to UIV voltage and speed them up.

-6184321923537677060:-75524450466052573.name: A Blast to the Past
-6184321923537677060:-75524450466052573.desc:
Now that you have the bioware mainframe, you have unlocked the first of the stargate trophies!
Yes, there's multiple of them, one for each major iteration of the stargate recipe.
These trophies are just that, trophies, and you can try to craft them if you want to compare the costs to today's stargate standards.
To complete these quests you have to submit two stargates' worth of materials.

Now, let me bestow upon you a short history lesson about this point in GT:NHs past.

The year is 2020. The bio mainframe was pretty much the end of GTNH progression at the time, not much above UHV existed or was craftable. This was also the point in the pack where you'd start scaling for stargate, as that too was tiered at UHV. Technically UEV parts were craftable, but their only uses were singleblocks for PAs (which only held up to 16 UEV machines) and the Deep Dark Portal. UEV-UMV energy hatches were craftable, but their recipes were simple hull + wire crafting table recipes
...and that was about it for UHV+ content.
With the recent addition of void miners, the previously thought to be impossible started to seem actually attainable, a set of stargates. Specifically, to craft a set of them, not just find them like others have before.

One group in particular, known as the Gigaplex, gave it their all and actually managed to do it, to prove that crafting stargates is possible with enough determination.

Thus, on the 16th of February, 2021, the first set of crafted stargates had been born.

P.S.: If you want to be as faithful to the challenge as possible, try completing this quest without using any of the modern functionality that didn't exist back then.
Here's a non-exhaustive list of major things that didn't exist (in no particular order):
-PCB Factory, Space Elevator, Component Assemblyline, AAL, PrAss, EEC, EIG, Compact Fusions, MCR, MABS
-Any bee related GT machines
-Any UEV or above multis
-XL Turbines, Naq fuel, LEG
-Sub 1-tick OC, Batch Mode, inbuilt Void Protection on multis
-Level Maintainer, AE Fluid Crafting, Stocking Buses/Hatches, Crafting Input Buses, ME Output Buses/Hatches, non-recursive AE component recipes
-Shift-clicking recipes into AE patterns (pain)
-Early-Midgame QoL such as ghost circuits, visual prospecting, reprogramming circuits with a screwdriver, seeing Assline recipes in NEI before having crafted them, and more

P.P.S: This quest is missing the chaotic capacitors on purpose, because the chaotic core recipe requires spacetime now, but the chaotic capacitor recipe did not change at all since then. All in all the cost for these banks was completely negligible back then and still is today, they only serve as a magic gate for SG.

-9087408117501276303:-55119287362369426.name: Matter Manipulator MKIII
-9087408117501276303:-55119287362369426.desc:
The MKIII is the final upgrade in the Matter Manipulator series, and grants you access to it's most heightened capabilities. With 10x the EU storage as the MKII, it also boasts an Unlimited block range and can handle placing 1024 Blocks / Second.

Feature wise, the MKIII comes with all of the same abilities as the MKII, except now with the ability to use the Quantum Uplink, though you won't be able to build that multiblock until UV.

-7027883461503210574:7775535122391976044.name: Creative Flight With MagLev
-7027883461503210574:7775535122391976044.desc:
Getting annoyed trying to reach pipes and conduits around your base? Look no further than the MagLev Harness!

With the MagLev, you can have creative flight whenever you are within range of a MagLev Pylon and have the Harness equip.

This will work even when unpowered, however the range of the Pylon gets doubled when it's given 1A of it's corresponding tier of power. The MagLev will only draw power while you are in-range, not passively. A Harness can only be tethered to one Pylon at a time, but a Pylon can attach to any number of Harnesses. Will only consume 1A regardless of how many Harnesses are tethered to the Pylon.

[note]Check the tooltip to see the range of your chosen Pylon, the MV one has a maximum range of 16 (33 x 33 x 33) when powered![/note]

-8527205068749159914:7736704316280356873.name: Zinc Gravel Ore
-8527205068749159914:7736704316280356873.desc: Having a hard time finding some Zinc Gravel Ore? I'll trade you some for your hard-earned coins.

-6573279534847578607:7755046755390540638.name: Powerfail Notifications
-6573279534847578607:7755046755390540638.desc:
Congratuations on your first EBF!

Throughout your GTNH gameplay you will end up creating hundreds of multiblocks, and will very likely run into a multitude of power failures at some point. 

Fortunately, we have a dedicated system for helping you stay informed of exactly when and where these power failures occur (though the 'why' portion is up to you to figure out!).

When a multiblock powerfails, you will receive a notification in chat, in addition to a visible icon on screen, and an icon visible on your map. 

You can clear these notifications by:
- Clicking into the multiblock that has powerfailed
- Deleting the notification in JourneyMap
- Typing /powerfails clear

For those playing multiplayer, anyone who is on your team will receive the same notifications. One person clearing a notification should clear it for all players.

[note]This feature uses the same team system as wireless EU. Use </gt global_energy_join [User Joining] [User to Join]> to team up.[/note]

All of these features can be turned off in the gregtech config. If you want the on screen icon to disappear use /powerfails hide. For all in-game options use /powerfails help.

-8177551156102963581:7533243528826208676.name: Diamond Shulker Box
-8177551156102963581:7533243528826208676.desc:
The portable equivalent of the Diamond Barrel, you'll need to either upgrade your wand or take advantage of the Gold -) Diamond shulker box upgrade.

Has 108 slots.

[note]Can be Dyed![/note]

-6644822685919168427:7596389702485821580.name: Pushing Back the Taint
-6644822685919168427:7596389702485821580.desc:
So how do you actually destroy tainted land?

These Ethereal Blooms will remove Tainted Lands within a small area around themselves, which in turn kills off any Fibrous Tendrils. They cannot cleanse Tainted Nodes, nor will they necessarily return tainted biomes back to what they were before, but they will provide a barrier.

The Shimmerleaf they are made from have a recipe in an LV Assembling Machine if you're having a hard time finding them around Silverwood trees. There is also an IC2 crop version of them.

-9078433263530968349:7597590231020554865.name: Speed up with the Sash
-9078433263530968349:7597590231020554865.desc:
The Sashes from Botania improves your speed passively along with a jump boost and provide Step assist all while fitting in your belt slot, how convenient is that?

You will need a method of powering them with either the mana tablet or the mana mirror linked to a pool.

The Soujourner Sash provides the basic speed boost, jump boost and step assist while the Globetrotter provides double the jump height and speed boost.

The Planestrider is special since it provides a slowly increasing speed boost as long as you are moving. You can even reach up to 11 times the Soujourner Sash speed boost!

[note]You only need to make one Sash to complete the quest.[/note]

-9089128153539631833:7608515228618870388.name: Time to Kill (Fox)
-9089128153539631833:7608515228618870388.desc: The Fox can be found in colder biomes. Make sure you're properly equipped, they're quite quick!

-5563376651650091647:7629061755871579674.name: Adding More Functions
-5563376651650091647:7629061755871579674.desc:
One such improvement is the Advanced Redcrystal.

It allows you to set a threshold with your wand to define how strong a signal needs to be in order to pass through. This can come in handy when checking fill level of tanks or power storage.

[note]One caveat for redstone experts: The Advanced Redcrystal checks the signal strength in the block it is in, not in the previous block like a comparator would.[/note]

-7668518413732747417:7633814918775392399.name: Poor Nether Waste
-7668518413732747417:7633814918775392399.desc: Once you've gathered enough froth, it can run through a Vacuum Furnace to get a number of useful resources. Most importantly though, this is where we extract Poor Nether Waste; a quite valuable fluid to the Netherite line.

-8261255533218631311:7703162765430901886.name: Housing for Advanced Fluid Components
-8261255533218631311:7703162765430901886.desc: You need to use this for the higher-tiered Fluid Cells.

-8788923125695859609:8038612610134264913.name: Keeping things organized
-8788923125695859609:8038612610134264913.desc:
Are you tired of storing Shapes and/or Molds near your Extruders and Solidifiers instead of inside them? Today must be your lucky day, because these item holders let you do exactly that!

They allow your machines to hold a small number of extra items, though each slot can only store one item at a time. There are three versions of this cover, each offering a different amount of storage:

Basic Item Holder: 9 slots
Good Item Holder: 12 slots
Advanced Item Holder: 15 slots

[note]If that's still not enough space and you are already using the highest tier, you can simply attach multiple holders to your machine of choice.[/note]

-4963691488064877327:8035535301018077667.name: Even Better Chassis
-4963691488064877327:8035535301018077667.desc:
2 Modules are still not enough? Need more recipe slots for machines?

Here is the Mk3. It can hold 3 modules.

-8595778749524835705:8055263756039637966.name: More SMD Inductors
-8595778749524835705:8055263756039637966.desc: Want some SMD inductors? Buy some!

-9114151446486300176:7811288503624286715.name: Scrub, Scrub, Scrub...
-9114151446486300176:7811288503624286715.desc:
The Wand Focus: Flux Scrubber is an incredibly useful focus for the messy or insane thaumaturge. It creates a beam that sucks up flux goo and gas.

[note]This focus accepts the following upgrades in the Focal Manipulator:[/note]
