Frugal: Lowers vis cost to cast by 10% per level
Potency: Speeds up flux cleanup
Crystallization: Drops Crystallized Potentia when cleaning up flux at level 1. Drops Crystallized Essence of a random aspect at level 2. Mutually exclusive with Warping and Calming
Warping: Gives its user temporary warp when used to clean flux. Mutually exclusive with Crystallization
Calming (level 5, requires Warping): Negates the effect of Warping. Removes some temporary or sticky warp when used to clean flux. Mutually exclusive with Crystallization

-5662664545508156018:7814101649481420545.name: Rule of Threes
-5662664545508156018:7814101649481420545.desc:
The final external structural upgrade to the Forge requires the most advanced understanding of graviton shards and their applications in extreme environments. With this, the last 4 module slots of the Forge of the Gods are available to construct, ascending your operation to unseen heights of technological mastery.

[note]Adding a third and final ring to your Godforge allows for 4 additional modules, as well as allowing you to pick all three paths in the split paths part of the upgrade tree, allowing for a fully upgraded Godforge.[/note]

[note]Usage of a third ring requires the EE upgrade.[/note]

-7992749153415472519:7831765874842158193.name: ...with the power of science!
-7992749153415472519:7831765874842158193.desc:
This multiblock will allow you to use all that UU-Matter that your Matter Fabricator makes, not that you don't have anything else to do with it...

[note]This multi is traditionally UV, but can technically be made in ZPM.[/note]

-5144566957992644258:7835418309258855501.name: Decay Warehouse
-5144566957992644258:7835418309258855501.desc:
The Decay Warehouse stores a single type of radioactive isotope and allows it to decay over time. 

The decay speed of the isotope is dependent on its half-life.

Isotopes will decay regardless of whether the warehouse is on or powered. 

The Warehouse's capacity equals the chest's capacity divided by 400.

Capacity of the multiblock for each chest:

Super Chest I: 10,000
Super Chest II: 20,000
Super Chest III: 40,000
Super Chest IV: 80,000
Super Chest V: 160,000
Quantum Chest I: 320,000
Quantum Chest II: 640,000
Quantum Chest III: 1,280,000
Quantum Chest IV: 2,560,000
Quantum Chest V: 5,368,000

[note]Right click the controller with a Screwdriver to dump stored isotopes into an output bus.

Right click the controller with a Plunger to empty it. [/note]

[warn]The Warehouse's contents are voided when the controller is broken[/warn]

-7957069611279940583:7836976352036995675.name: The power of prospecting!
-7957069611279940583:7836976352036995675.desc:
At the top of your map screen (J by default) there are multiple tabs, some of them will be very useful and will save you a ton of searching!

GT Oreveins - this tab will keep track of the veins for you, to save a vein to map right-click a naturally generated ore (some tools can't right-click)
GT Underground fluids - this will help you later (MV)
TC Nodes - this tab will keep track of thaumcraft nodes for you (you need to scan them first)

[note]Small Ores are not part of veins and thus do not uncover a vein on the map. However veins generate extra small ores related to the vein in their chunks, so they can still be useful in your search (though not all small ores are related to a nearby vein so don't be fooled).[/note]

[note]Another great interaction is that you can use the NEI search bar in highlight mode (double-click it) and then go to the map screen to get the matching uncovered ore veins highlighted![/note]

-6269476597080921136:7842301023653611291.name: Absolute Purity
-6269476597080921136:7842301023653611291.desc:
Absolute Baryonic Perfection! This multiblock allows you to create water that is pure even on the subatomic level. Not a single quark is out of place in Grade 8 Purified Water. Thanks to this purity, even more advanced processes are possible, starting with reducing the processing time of Optical Boules and increasing yield on Optical Chips.

While the tooltip is certainly a lot less intimidating than the one of the Degasser, automating this process will not be an easy challenge. Have fun solving the puzzle!

-5758255961960012806:7843197398684813402.name: Welcome to the Plasma Chain
-5758255961960012806:7843197398684813402.desc:
Hello there! If you've unlocked fusion, you can start this questline, but keep in mind that it's divided into three segments (the three fusion chains): one for each tier of Fusion Reactor, from Mk1 to Mk3.

There are more fine details surrounding plasma power generation you can access by using the following Wiki link: [url]https://wiki.gtnewhorizons.com/wiki/Fusion_Reactor[/url]

These quests follow the process of creating some truly powerful plasmas that are useful for power generation at the beginning of endgame, when you've scaled up your setup to a Compact Fusion Reactor and XL Plasma Turbines. As you might have seen before, those huge turbines can go very fast with good materials, like Trinium or Infinity, but they will apply EU/t penalties according to the fuel value of the plasma used. This means that Helium and Tin Plasma are both much weaker there than they were in Large Plasma Turbines.

The end product of this whole process is Celestial Tungsten Plasma, which has no penalties even at Spacetime and can somewhat match what Helium Plasma would have produced, per compact reactor. The last step is the slowest, but, if there are no other bottlenecks, you can expect around over 8 billion EU/t assuming a single compact doing the last step with huge infinity turbines in a plasma XL.

However, getting there won't be easy. This whole process uses 15 fusion recipes in total, and a lot more material automation than any of the simple fusion setups. This questline will help explain what is simple, not simple, or possibly a bottleneck. If you complete this, you will be sustained in powergen until the Dyson Swarm, or whatever other option appears later on, and it will continue being useful later on!

-7959189288003028041:7851484242627545128.name: Black Dwarf Matter
-7959189288003028041:7851484242627545128.desc:
Reinforcing your casings with matter from white dwarfs was a good idea.

You can now accelerate a solar system until a black dwarf forms. This material will likely be key to observing and understanding what happens next.

This is the second of your three EOH materials. Use it to upgrade your casings to T7.

[note]The EOH becomes power positive once all the casings are Tier 7.[/note]

-5135866447130008070:7854462172184923159.name: It gets polymorphic
-5135866447130008070:7854462172184923159.desc:
Sometimes people have a storage system that contains a lot of different items, or they have a large quantity of the same item.

Here comes the Polymorphic ItemSink. It assigns inventory space to the kind of items already in the inventory.

Very handy especially when you have a storage controller connecting to a lot of drawers.

-8321971917314713709:8066762646697952752.name: Don't Lose That Multiblock Miner!
-8321971917314713709:8066762646697952752.desc:
It's easy to lose Ore Drilling Plants. You're a busy engineer, you know? You can't be bothered to remember trifling things like "where, in what galactic backwater did I last place my miner." You could do something boring like "write down the location of the miner" or "put up a sign with the miner's location in my ore processing area," but there's a better way.

Enter the Metrics Transmitter Cover. This cover, when attached to a multiblock miner (or any GregTech machine), spawns in a GregTech Advanced Sensor Card paired to the host machine. This card, when inserted into a NuclearCraft Industrial Information Panel, will receive runtime information transmitted by the host machine, including its current location. Additionally, it returns the same information that its lower-tech sibling, the GregTech Sensor Kit, provides. Unlike the GregTech Sensor Kit, the Metrics Transmitter Cover works interdimensionally and at any range without the need of range upgrades. In addition, since covers remain on machines when they are dismantled, the paired sensor card will continue to work even if the host machine is relocated, and never needs to be recalibrated. This makes it perfect for the Ore Drilling Plant and Oil/Gas/Fluid Drilling Rig, which are deployed in the field and often have to be relocated.

However, like always, there's a catch. If the Metrics Transmitter Cover is detached from its host machine, the paired sensor card will be destroyed. Maybe you shouldn't be using a crowbar around sensitive electronics...

-6697627242772387263:7905693324829737052.name: Sustainable Paper
-6697627242772387263:7905693324829737052.desc:
Now that you got your first paper, it's time for a better way to get more. With paperbark you can do just that.

Once grown you can obtain paper by right-clicking the logs of the tree. The bark regrows in due time.

-8657886999178451122:7918305551535850538.name: TNT and iTNT
-8657886999178451122:7918305551535850538.desc: Want some TNT or iTNT? Buy some!

-8049119362564896392:7924911883518364305.name: Understanding Wand Progression
-8049119362564896392:7924911883518364305.desc:
More advanced Thaumcraft recipes require larger and larger amounts of vis that your initial wands can't handle. You need to progress bit by bit to increase your capabilities. The progression is two-fold:

First, you need to craft more advanced wands, the Greatwood Wand is next. And secondly, you need to improve your crafting discounts. They reduce the vis cost of crafts and thus also let you craft higher vis recipes.

In your progression you will need to rely on both aspects. Better wands and higher discounts. However, as you progress, there are many different ways on how to proceed. Some ways focus more on discounts, others more on wands. Therefore, the questbook can only give you some general advice.

For example, when making a new wand type, it is always cheapest to first make it with iron caps and then try to improve it afterwards. One way you can improve your wand is by swapping the cores & caps for higher tiers as you unlock them (see "Substitution" research). However, if you are able to obtain enough discounts you can directly make the wand with gold caps or better, skipping the iron capped wand altogether.

But before all these options really open up, let us work on that Greatwood Wand!

-9064898237805017210:7944675850370041384.name: You've Gotta Keep 'Em Separated
-9064898237805017210:7944675850370041384.desc:
When you need to polarize magnets or separate magnetic materials, look to the MFE! This multiblock requires an electromagnet to be inserted into its housing - better magnets, better bonuses. In IV, you'll be stuck with an Iron Electromagnet, though.

[note]At the final tier of electromagnet, you can use TecTech multi-amp hatches. Might be good to remember when you're processing a certain magnetic material...[/note]

-6562319546724824113:8016356120065296990.name: XL Turbo SC Steam Turbine
-6562319546724824113:8016356120065296990.desc:
The most dense steam available. Check the XL Steam Turbine quest above for an explanation of the mechanics shared across all turbines.

This turbine has unexpected bugs related to the integer limit, when using the best turbine materials in the pack. There might also be other limitations when trying to move billions of SC Steam per tick from one place to another. Be wary of bugs when trying to use this XL turbine with endgame turbine materials.

-6007564242168652354:8088831382591653628.name: Crafting Input Proxy
-6007564242168652354:8088831382591653628.desc:
You have mastered both interdimensional transportation and wallsharing, why not combine them?

You can link both crafting input bus/buffer to proxies with data sticks and use it to process patterns with multiple machines, as if you are wallsharing them, but without actually wallsharing them.

[note]Maybe this can reduce lag?[/note]

-6939546665296547760:8195423071654985796.name: Essentia Storage
-6939546665296547760:8195423071654985796.desc:
At long last, you have all the tools to smelt items into Essentia, keep it stable, and store it for later use.

The last step was creating Warded Jars, relatively simple creations that keep Essentia in a quasi-liquid state, which makes it easier to keep Essentia from turning into Flux. Unlike phials, which must hold 8 Essentia exactly to keep it stable, Warded Jars can store anywhere from 1 to 64 Essentia.

These Warded Jars are safe to pick up and carry around, which you suspect will not be the case for most objects storing much more Essentia than these jars do. Right-click them with a label to filter that jar to a specific type of Essentia. Use a preset label if the jar is still empty.

Sneak-right-click with an empty hand to remove a label from a jar, or void the Essentia it contains if it doesn't have a label. Voiding Essentia from jars will not generate Flux, because... magic, I guess. It's very convenient, so just politely don't question it too much.

-7572857785921427532:8208028268737479211.name: The Everlasting Guilty Pool
-7572857785921427532:8208028268737479211.desc: Mana for all of your needs, endless amounts of mana.

-4811681098047879827:8265375511745548121.name: IV 4A Hatches
-4811681098047879827:8265375511745548121.desc: Same as the EV Multi-amp hatches, use these to extract and insert many amps from your LSC.

-7508677545920872020:8615792699240694016.name: Cracking the World
-7508677545920872020:8615792699240694016.desc: How much oil do you need? Or maybe it's Naquadah Fuel you're after, or Radox... either way, this massive structure can handle it, boasting 256 parallels.

-6508607048488154369:8417490253973375530.name: Dark Steel Barrel
-6508607048488154369:8417490253973375530.desc: The Dark Steel barrel holds 135 items! And is also immune to explosions.

-7251205103661839761:8434508527125743555.name: XL Turbo Plasma Turbine

-8463515684422388364:8441054184604649812.name: Powering Logistics
-8463515684422388364:8441054184604649812.desc:
Every system takes power. A Logistics Pipes network is no exception.

The Logistics Pipes system runs on an energy called LP, but there are no generators that generate LP.

Instead, Logistics Pipes has a power adapter called the Logistics Power Junction that converts EU into LP. Use a Basic Logistics Pipe to connect the Power Junction to the whole network.

The Power Junction can receive power from all 6 sides while a Basic Logistics Pipe can only connect to the sides in the 4 cardinal directions.

-8363105124200355806:8470087348094322293.name: Cheaper ZPM Circuits
-8363105124200355806:8470087348094322293.desc:
Living bio chip can perform multiple tasks at once and will make your ZPM circuits cheaper!

[note]This does cost quite a bit of hypogen, perhaps hold off on using these until you can make hypogen easily.[/note]

-8321627444342603894:8482162476235245205.name: Copper Shulker Box
-8321627444342603894:8482162476235245205.desc:
The portable equivalent of the Copper Barrel.

Has 45 slots.

[note]Can be Dyed![/note]

-7597752225046936010:8531272445575776324.name: Level Maintainer
-7597752225046936010:8531272445575776324.desc:
The ME Level Maintainer is another cool addition of AE2FC. Choose an item or fluid and an amount to maintain, and the Level Maintainer will attempt to call patterns to keep crafting the item until it reaches the threshold you configured. You can also configure the crafting batch size.

[note]For fluid crafts, put in a fluid drop and don't drag from NEI.[/note]

-5235602628658218321:8927624475252967698.name: Crystal Chest
-5235602628658218321:8927624475252967698.desc:
You've created a chest that allows you to see what's inside, isn't that useful?

[note]Just as with the previous chests you can also upgrade with a fitting upgrade item.[/note]

-7084124104927191421:8665603466225339977.name: Download More RAM
-7084124104927191421:8665603466225339977.desc: Only the most advanced memory chips will do when working with optical computers.

-5722547895249924043:8747029634746306519.name: Growing your own Knowledge!
-5722547895249924043:8747029634746306519.desc:
Ever thought to yourself "man, why does everything have to use primal aspects so much?" Well now you won't have to worry about that anymore!

Meet the Rosa Mysteria. When the sprout planted on a Crystal Block, it will use that block's essence to grow into an Aspect Shard of the same type! These shards can then be thrown into your Cauldron or Alchemical Furnace, or used as Knowledge Fragments to gain Research Points. Even Mixed Crystals can be used as a catalyst!

[warn]Warning: Planting Rosa Mysteria on Tainted Crystal Blocks will lead to unforseen   consequences.[/warn]

-8274215243329909479:8759504708348955278.name: Relentless Glue
-8274215243329909479:8759504708348955278.desc:
Ethyl Cyanoacrylate, commonly known as Super Glue is the best glue there is. But with great power comes... great complexity. It's not needed now and probably for the next few tiers, but it will make your recipes more efficient and will be necessary in the lategame.

[note]Technically this line is available in IV, but only optional. Show your true skills by searching the recipes in NEI yourself![/note]

-8868495820464237601:8829866191450688815.name: pH Neutralization
-8868495820464237601:8829866191450688815.desc:
If you want to process your Europium-Doped Wafers with a significant speed boost, this machine is for you. Using the pH neutral water you get from this machine, you can process wafers twice as fast.

This is the first real complex automation challenge in the waterline, it's up to you to figure out how you want to deal with the pH neutralization process. Have fun!

[note]This multiblock is very picky about where its hatches for acids and bases go. If you can't figure out why it's not forming, chances are you forgot to place these hatches in the correct location. Use the hologram projector to see where they go.[/note]

-8929525966506400783:8857167915238576065.name: Using that Algae
-8929525966506400783:8857167915238576065.desc:
So you've created the Chemical Plant, and an Algae Farm, excellent! Time to make some use of it instead of letting it sit there collecting. There's quite a few recipes you can make with Algae, but we'll start with a more simple one.

For this you'll need some Brown Algae and some Green Algae. This means you need at minimum HV machine casings for the bottom of the Algae Farm. HV will produce up to 8 brown algae every 35 seconds, but can at worst case produce 2 in 105 seconds, while EV will produce at best 20 every 30 seconds, and at worst 12 in 90 seconds.

Once you have some Green and Brown Algae, you'll have to put them in a tier 2 Chemical Plant (steel based) with some distilled water, and you'll get back Sulfuric Acid. Cheap to produce once you have it all set up, a bit expensive to get there though! There's another Sulfuric acid recipe you can use as well later on, but it'll cost higher tier Algae and a higher tier Chemical Plant.

-6915086947092752744:8985243382793193385.name: An End to Deforestation
-6915086947092752744:8985243382793193385.desc:
This multiblock is the perfect solution to high-speed tree farming. Do you need wood for charcoal or benzene power? Nuts for seed oil? Leaf blocks for decoration? Look no further!

The Tree Growth Simulator can farm almost any tree in the game, and produces all the items you would get by chopping it down normally. All this in a compact 3x3x3 cube, without any lag from growing a real tree.

First, place any sapling in the controller slot of the multiblock. Then, insert tools appropriate to the part of the tree you want to harvest in an input bus. Give the machine power, turn it on, and be ready to get flooded by the outputs.

Different tools are required to gather different parts of the tree:
 - Saw for logs
 - Branch Cutter for saplings
 - Shears for leaves
 - Knife for fruit
Better versions of the tools (Chainsaw, Grafter, ...) will increase the yield! Check the tooltip of the controller block for details.

You can even use multiple different tools together, and the machine will harvest several different products at the same time!

Note that the tools used will slowly lose durability, so for long-term operation you might want to set up some automatic replacement.

[note]While this machine only requires IV, it is quite expensive to make early in the tier. You will need 16 ZPM circuits and some fancy alloys.[/note]

-5816092802750880657:9012220195932555052.name: Better Make that Two!
-5816092802750880657:9012220195932555052.desc:
You may need a second anvil! 

One would have been for the Forge Hammer and another for general repairing or renaming!

-7063329900109640972:9032551989340031586.name: Naquarite Universal Insulator Foil
-7063329900109640972:9032551989340031586.desc: Finally, you can combine the Radiation-Proof Composite Sheet with Netherite Foil and Manyullyn in the Forming Press to create Naquarite Universal Insulator Foil. This incredibly strong foil can be used to bind ingredients to all of your future coils due to it's unrivaled radiation and heat resistance.

-6918418604701965607:9065412797470428688.name: Prismarine Precipitate
-6918418604701965607:9065412797470428688.desc:
After creating the Prismarine-Rich Nitrobenzene Solution, you'll need to process it using a Chemical Plant with Strontium Hydroxide. Once processed, you can successfully obtain your first Prismarine Precipitate.

[warn]This line produces excess Strontium, so no need to worry about its continuous injection.[/warn]

[note]If you have not gotten Strontium yet, you can obtain it from Strontium Oxide based on Rare Earth 3 or from Spessartine Froth.[/note]

-5769420916380359643:9096591528313636359.name: Stellar Catalyst
-5769420916380359643:9096591528313636359.desc:
Your attempts to improve your dimensional catalyst have been futile so far, but with the Raw Stellar Plasma from your Eye of Harmony, you can finally create a stable and more powerful catalyst.

You will need some higher-tier plasmas to help maintain its stability as well.

[warn]Handle with care. We are not responsible for your base turning into supermassive black holes. /s[/warn]

-6167478518452759927:9108392492578785489.name: Solid, Directional Redstone
-6167478518452759927:9108392492578785489.desc:
Redstone Dust is a wonderful substance, but it has several limitations that only true Minecrafters can handle.

Luckily, with a bit of magic the dust crystallizes and becomes much easier to handle.

Redcrystal can be placed directly against a wall or ceiling, and also allows you to use a wand to toggle whether a given side sends/receives any redstone signals. This allows for nice and compact builds in places regular redstone couldn't even exist in the first place.

Maybe it is possible to improve these redcrystals further to allow them to manipulate or process the signal they're receiving in some way...

-7565512237463838538:9111043962560858024.name: UIV Energy Hatch
-7565512237463838538:9111043962560858024.desc:
Woah, another Energy Hatch.

You should probably consider upgrading your Assembly Lines and Precise Assemblers first.

-6939821207402967394:9150468808087585802.name: Wait are you sure?
-6939821207402967394:9150468808087585802.desc:
So for some reason you have decided to pick the EBF option.

Well get ready for a processing line.

First you need to react Thorium Dust with Hydrofluoric Acid and eight buckets of Nitric Acid. I hope you have a Nitric Acid setup.

Then react the Thorium Nitrate with Sodium Hydroxide to produce Thorium Hydroxide. Then react with even more Hydrofluoric Acid to get Thorium Tetrafluoride.

Then pump it into a Centrifuge to separate the normal Thorium away from the Thorium 232. Sadly it is still in a liquid form so you will need to blast it with Zinc Chloride and Calcium.

Then finally use your Blast Furnace again for the Zn-Th alloy ingot to separate the Zinc from the Thorium 232 to obtain the Thorium 232 Dust and even get your Zinc back in fluid form.

Well I hope you enjoyed the processing line for Thorium 232 EBF edition.

-6067382707378224204:-898633249240866749.name: An Even More Mega EBF
-6067382707378224204:-898633249240866749.desc:
With the project finally completed, and a new material capable of harnessing the power of a neutron star, you decide the natural first application of this immense power could be used for a far superior Blast Furnace. With a little tinkering, you decide a second may be necessary, since this module could easily be retrofitted into an ordinary Furnace as well.

[note]The first module of the Godforge, Helioflare Power Forge can perform EBF recipes and Furnace recipes in separate running modes, toggleable in the UI. Note that the Furnace mode does NOT contribute towards the Conversion milestone![/note]

[note]Usage of this module requires the START upgrade.[/note]

-5074117915743852125:-922136505637474916.name: No Boss Needed! How Sad!
-5074117915743852125:-922136505637474916.desc:
To get this schematic you don't need to defeat any boss. You will still need to invest some time.

After researching a T8 Rocket Schematic you are able to build the Shuttle Schematic in the Assembly Line.

-4804005527088963644:-917746978609553150.name: Nano Resin - Particle Extractors
-4804005527088963644:-917746978609553150.desc:
Arrange Nanites in P-507 and label them with target particle information in the high-energy laser beam environment of a laser engraver. Then we get the Extracting Unit called "Nano Resin".

These Nanites automatically capture the target particles in solution and store them in the resin. It is worth noting that the actual production rate will be limited by the number of Nanites. So if you want to use this method to produce lanthanides in large quantities, you need to prepare more extra Nano Resin.

Here are all 15 types of Extracting Nano Resin.

-5201462720540834507:-916808146103243441.name: Can it!
-5201462720540834507:-916808146103243441.desc: If you've ever needed to wait on a Canning Machine to fill up your supply of tin cans, or for a Fluid Canning Machine to make mountains of coolant, consider the TurboCan Pro. This multiblock acts as both machines and has significant bonuses - when the time comes that you decide you need it!

-8533404977696523804:-915678339079187455.name: Fueling the DTPF
-8533404977696523804:-915678339079187455.desc:
To run the DTPF, you will need to feed it excited catalyst. There are four tiers of catalyst you can make right now, and one more to unlock later. Making these catalysts requires a lot of power and time, so you will almost certainly want to passive this with many machines.

In UIV, you will unlock the plasma mixer, a dedicated multiblock that can make catalyst much faster than you currently can, although this comes at an enormous power cost. Either way, it's probably a good idea to get this as soon as you can.

-7122426930826890446:-912580449932356454.name: Alleviating Warp
-7122426930826890446:-912580449932356454.desc:
When you get poisoned or withered a bit of milk solves the problem. Why not create something akin to milk, but for Warp effects?

Briar gives a bit of an answer to that. These two block tall plants, which require good light to grow, will produce Briar Seed Bags when harvested. Those can be combined with sugar and a suitable container in an Arcane Workbench to create Rosehip Syrup.

Rosehip Syrup stacks up to 16 and can be used the same as milk, also removing some (though not all) Warp effects as well as Flux Flue and Flux Phage.

The plant has a strange life cycle where the seed pods will first appear as yellow dots, turn pink as they start to mature, then disappear, only to return fully matured. Still, if it works, it works.

-5127090567145017193:-892657674871391709.name: Don't Tell Me I Need To Read A Paper Map!
-5127090567145017193:-892657674871391709.desc: The Mothership Navigation Console is used to select the Mothership's destination.

-8198041923981670459:-891398873848163237.name: Multiblock Revolution
-8198041923981670459:-891398873848163237.desc:
The steam machines you have been using until now have served you well, but there will be a time when you need to process even more items. That's where the so-called multiblocks come in. There's a variety of steam multiblocks available to you - go have a look at the Mass Processing quest tab!

This tab introduces you to a wide range of extremely powerful multiblock machines that can replace your old, worn-out singleblocks (and some that can replace your old multiblocks!). Many of these new machines will require you to handle additional mechanics and requirements, but it will be worth it!

Here are some terms you should be familiar with as you enter the world of multiblocks:

Overclock (OC):
If a machine can handle at least 4 times the voltage that is required for a recipe, it will overclock - causing it to require 4x the EU/t but also run 2x as fast. This can happen multiple times!

Perfect Overclock (Often phrased as "Does not lose efficiency when overclocked):
Some machines conditionally (or unconditionally) perform perfect overclocks: in this case, the machine will require 4x the EU/t, but it will run 4x as fast instead, leading to both increased speed and no net increase in the total EU usage!

Parallel (Often phrased as "Processes x items"):
Machines which parallel act as if they are running multiple of themselves - that is to say, they are able to perform multiple of the same recipe at the same time, using the recipe's EU/t multiplied by the number of parallels. Machines which parallel will [warn]PRIORITIZE[/warn] this behavior over overclocking, which is good for you! Parallels are more efficient.

Input Separation:
Refers to a machine's behavior when choosing inputs for a recipe. With Input Separation on, you must have all required items for a recipe in one bus. With Input Separation off, you can split item inputs of a recipe between multiple busses.

[note]When working with multiblocks, if power is interrupted during operation, your inputs will be lost forever... careful![/note]

-8292298142465967897:-890114362343494249.name: LAPUTA XX
-8292298142465967897:-890114362343494249.desc: The most powerfull version of the Laputa shard... Maybe instead of using it you should think about meteors.

-7454595483869697856:-887453913421432201.name: Simulating a Solar System
-7454595483869697856:-887453913421432201.desc:
Almost as expensive as the real one, right? Not to worry, this stargate and the current are only just the beginning.

[note]Our journey reaches the current end, entering the UXV, aka EOH era.

The year is 2023, and the game continues to be pushed further and further. The EOH exists now, along with machine parts up to UXV. Multiblocks have gained endless amounts of quality of life, including sub 1-tick OC, batch mode, void protection, and numerous AE2 additions like Crafting Input Buses, Stocking Hatches, Level Maintainers and more. Automation has never been easier, yet the goal has never been placed farther. Naquadah Fuel now has many tiers and can compete into the late-game, even competing with (now fixed) Dyson, but outclassed by the huge amount of power a maximized EOH can make (12.8 TEU/t!).

Initially the stargate recipe seemed impossible, requiring months of runtime on hundreds of maximized EOHs, requiring some adjustments to be more realistic to attain. After this was changed, the race began again, this time between Johny709 and GDCloud. Johny burned out towards the end, and GDCloud was surpassed by a silent contender, StarStack, being the first to conquer this challenge on the 26th of June, 2023.

Beyond just the first, this era marked the beginning of the Group Run Era, with large runs such as Ballers Run (setting this era into motion), Bee Run (affecting wide change on the NH project and its management as a whole), and Cell Run 2 (the fastest ever Stargate run, in only 73 days, popularizing many automation techniques like Level Maintained lines).

Additionally, this version saw the first player achieve GTNH Gods, reaching Stargate in a 3rd run, earned by GDCloud as a part of Cell Run 2 on the 23rd of June, 2024. Later this Stargate would see three others reach this goal, Ramspace on the 29th of September, 2024, and StaffiX and serenibyss in a group run on the 17th of November, 2024.

P.S.: Here's the list as usual:
-Many new processing multiblocks like HILE, Fluid Shaper, Industrial Autoclave, etc.
-Forge of the Gods, Black Hole Compressor, Antimatter power generation, Precise Assembler T4
-DTPF Convergence, Component Assembly Line tiered bonuses, Mega Vac Subspace Cooling, MK5 fusion skips for Metastable Oganesson
-Wireless Data Hatches, Wireless Optical Hatches, Uncertainty Resolution
-Artificial Universe Cells, smart blocking mode[/note]

-8519332959416810697:-884475827561324337.name: Nano Forge Tier 4
-8519332959416810697:-884475827561324337.desc:
The Transcendent nanite has the required complexity and speed to create most nanites, but lacks the strength required to handle the exotic, hyper-dense, magnetic forms of matter you need to manipulate in order to advance. Fortunately with Eternity, you have found an ample replacement that should be up to the task... But you suspect that you'll need a far more complicated structure to be able to contain such a process.

[note]Grants the ability to create Magmatter Nanites in addition to a greater speed at the cost of assembling a more expensive structure.[/note]

-6892498627708657446:-883441589903207578.name: Saving on SpaceTime
-6892498627708657446:-883441589903207578.desc:
SpaceTime is quite a challenge, isn't it? You should definitely consider upgrading your Component Assembly Lines to save on some of it.

[note]Did you know you can wall-share the component casings? Just turn one CoAL upside down.[/note]

-9128088765873917748:-865034731566646686.name: Your First Flint Sword
-9128088765873917748:-865034731566646686.desc:
It's time to upgrade your wooden sword a little.

You only need one stick, one bone, and one flint to create the new weapon. However, it's recommended that you gather extra flint since it can be used to repair the sword.

You won't be able to kill a Wither with it now, but you can upgrade and improve this tool later.

-5617553811869142035:-876283805311518098.name: NEI Next Level Recipe Search
-5617553811869142035:-876283805311518098.desc:
NEI recipe search has been improved even further!

As you might already know, recipe search works ONLY inside the recipe search field just like in other search modes. This is the small field that replaces the recipe page number, when you click on the magnifying glass on the left from that number when viewing recipes. Extended+ does NOT give you the ability to search recipes in the big main search field below.

Select the search mode "extended+" to try it out!

Here backticks `` are used around the search queries, but you don't need them when searching.

By default the search works like in the extended mode, searching in any of the inputs and outputs of a recipe. So if you search a recipe by `-dust`, it will return all recipes where there's at least one item that doesn't have "dust".

Let's say you want to search only in inputs. Put < before your search query to do that. For example: `<iron` returns all the recipes with "iron" in one of the inputs, `<steel@gregtech` returns the recipes with at least one item from any mod containing Gregtech in their name, using "steel".

But then, if you search by `<-dust` it still returns the recipes with "dust" on the left. Why is that? Because < searches among all items. So if there's one item that doesn't have "dust", then it would still match the recipe, even if the rest of the inputs are dusts.

To solve this, use <& instead. Like this: `<&-dust`. It returns all the recipes without "dust" among the inputs! <& sets a strict condition on all inputs, unlike < that sets a condition on any input.

To filter the outputs use > and >&. They work the same way, but allow you to filter the outputs of a recipe. So `>gold` gives you the recipes with at least one output with "gold". And `>&gold` gives you the recipes with "gold" in every outputted item.

Want to combine multiple conditions? Sure, just put them one after another in any order. E.g. you could search for `<iron>steel`, `<& -$dust < cell`, `>&-dust cell`.

Or even for `dust>cell`. Here the non-prefixed part works like default, searching among all items from the inputs and outputs. So this query returns the recipes with "dust" in one of the inputs or outputs and "cell" in one of the outputs.

In some recipes you might have items that don't belong to inputs or outputs. In order to filter them use `^` and `^&` respectively.

You can add spaces for readability too, because (unless you have space mode on) spaces can be used anywhere while in extended+ mode.

-6807508918864111229:-872019523766273497.name: Never Hungry Again
-6807508918864111229:-872019523766273497.desc:
Congratulations! You have gracefully served your penance; no longer shall you be bound by the woes of hunger. 

With this new trinket (equipable in a baubles slot) you will automatically have your hunger and saturation replenished, so long as the nanobooster stays charged.

Additionally it will do it's best to keep you healed, though it cannot ward off death completely on its own.

[note]P.S. Upgrading your wireless charger might be a good idea![/note]

-5636991039177227943:-870804838208783875.name: Subspace Cooling
-5636991039177227943:-870804838208783875.desc:
Cooling exotic ingots proves to be a much bigger challenge than smelting them.

Fortunately, reinforcing some of the casings with your new materials allows you to inject exotic coolants that capture extreme heat in miniature tears of spacetime, helping to cool your ingots a bit faster.

With Subspace Cooling, you can enable the Vacuum Freezer to achieve Perfect Overclocks… at a cost.

Tier 1 will consume SpaceTime in liquid form at [warn]7500 L/s[/warn] and allow for 1 Perfect Overclock.

[note]This cost is very high but static, remaining the same for each recipe being run. So, be selective about cooling your ingots.

The faster the recipes, the more efficient the cost, so find your optimal balance.[/note]

The Infinity Cooled Casings replace the frost proof casings, so you don't need to worry about damaging your setups.

-5973404310081765177:-857968519055466144.name: The Perfect CPU?
-5973404310081765177:-857968519055466144.desc: Using your new optically enhanced boards and chips, you've managed to create what looks like the perfect CPU! Surely this will be able to handle even the advanced computations you need to perform to breach dimensional boundaries.

-8290416396327675508:-856666803712168637.name: EV 16A Hatches
-8290416396327675508:-856666803712168637.desc: These ones can extract and insert 16A.

-9191592960624051857:-854513510186108288.name: Alternative to blasting off!?
-9191592960624051857:-854513510186108288.desc:
Are you sick and tired of using the rocket to blast off every time and want an alternative and faster method? The EnderIO Telepad is a 3x3x1 structure that when powered with RF will teleport the player to a set coordinate.

To set the Coordinate you will need a Coordinate selector tool to mark an area by shift-right-clicking to mark. Then shift-right-click the middle of the EnderIO Telepad pad to set the desired location.

Then stand on the pad and click teleport to be sent in style.

-5243481096921136607:-844864016790452358.name: No More (IC) Engraving
-5243481096921136607:-844864016790452358.desc:
Now that you've reached ZPM, you're going to have to resort to means other than mere laser engraving for your photolithography needs.

Of course, we're going overkill right away, requiring a full-on particle accelerator setup to produce the ultra-coherent ultra-high-energy light used to etch more advanced ICs.

To begin with, you'll need a Source Chamber to produce electrons (at pitifully low energies, of course). Check out NEI for the available recipes, you'll want the one with the hand-drawn icon.

-9071312821552184337:-842976013199125422.name: 16384k Essentia Storage Cell
-9071312821552184337:-842976013199125422.desc:
These hold 33,554,432 units of essentia.

And can hold 60 types.

-5822922617462713444:-826566533632614358.name: Raw Diamond Ore Exchange
-5822922617462713444:-826566533632614358.desc: You can exchange your stack of Raw Diamond Ore for vanilla Diamond Ore.

-5958780612107171344:-824466443441502338.name: Quantum Uplink
-5958780612107171344:-824466443441502338.desc:
The Quantum Uplink is a multi made specifically for the Matter Manipulator that is unlocked with the aid of UV tech. 

This allows the Matter Manipulator to connect to your ME system over an infinite range, and across dimensions. The tool can be linked by placing it into the controller while the uplink is active. The uplink will take a continous 1A of ZPM power to function.

Additionally, you can now use it to create fake ME patterns upon selecting an area. This will make it quick to order all of the parts needed for Copy & Pasting in an area. 

[warn]The Uplink is powerful, but at a cost. Moving all items / fluids from the AE system will cost a small amount of plasma per transfer. 

Specifically: 16k EU of plasma per item / per 1000L of fluid[/warn]

-6087268361248963518:-819037683106078619.name: Tier 12 (UMV)
-6087268361248963518:-819037683106078619.desc:
Welcome to the current penultimate tier of New Horizons, Mega Ultimate Voltage.

This tier is the tier for upgrading everything and provides access to better parts to help you scale up.

Good Luck.

[warn]This tier is not fully complete. Expect stuff to change.[/warn]

-6045671959528753382:-816289923370311637.name: Digging Deep for Water
-6045671959528753382:-816289923370311637.desc:
Is the Water Tank not cutting it anymore? Have you set up in a dry biome and are in desperate need of more water? Fear not, for the Steam Water Pump can solve your issues! This Multiblock is able to produce large amounts of Water if fed with Steam (1500L/s).

Like other Steam Multiblocks, it can be upgraded by using Steel Frame Boxes instead of Bronze ones, which doubles the Water output at no additional Steam cost.

It is, however, still dependent on how humid the Biome you are in is, so keep that in mind.

Hint: You can find small lead ore in the Nether!

[note]P.S. The optional quest item count includes the cost for the controller. [/note]

-8063033383018802688:-814630606227182219.name: Gold
-8063033383018802688:-814630606227182219.desc: There are a plethora of ways to acquire gold, but here's one more for the dedicated apiarist. This breeding chain will eventually allow you to reach Sunnarium. You'll need a Block of Gold and a biome with a hot temperature. Breed them from Copper and Lead.

-7497528900357426935:-814507952657607527.name: Counting Items
-7497528900357426935:-814507952657607527.desc:
The Remote Comparator makes it significantly easier to get comparator signals out of whatever block you want, but looking at your storage chests you can't help but see no reason to bother. So what if they're nearly full? You want to know what they're nearly full of.

Tally Boxes can be pointed at a container - either directly or, using a Remote Comparator, remotely - and given a Runic Whitelist that specifies conditions where you want a Tally Box to send a redstone signal. Quantity, metadata and NBT matching are options, as is using a basic name filter.

Note that the redstone side is always opposite the reading side, and Remote Comparators must be placed on top of Tally Boxes to work together, meaning redstone is always output on the down face in that case.

[note]Runic Whitelists don't let you use NEI ghost items to set their filters, unfortunately.[/note]

-6890147797704476497:-783318241305295050.name: The SUCC
-6890147797704476497:-783318241305295050.desc:
Like its predecessor it can run 4 different recipes at once, but this time each recipe has 16 parallels.

A good solution for your Hydrogen and Helium problems.

[note]This also requires Eternity to craft.[/note]

-5399646287042766590:-779467447147998030.name: Tier 10 (UEV)
-5399646287042766590:-779467447147998030.desc: Welcome to Extremely Ultimate Voltage! Now that you've started making your first infinity, it's time to start scaling up. In this tier, every component will require infinity. Be prepared to make tons. Your main goal to advance will be to build the Dimensionally Transcendent Plasma Forge, also known as the DTPF. This massive multiblock will unlock new powerful recipes to create infinity, neutronium and other special materials.

-7599953951282587810:-806348220113818319.name: Going Superluminal
-7599953951282587810:-806348220113818319.desc:
The Superluminal Acceleration card is the fastest AE card that you can use to transfer items or fluids.

[note]Superluminal Acceleration cards can only be placed in:[/note]

ME IO Port (3)

In an IO Port, the Superluminal Acceleration Card will transfer items at a rate of:

1x Cards: 33,554,432 items/tick
2x Cards: 2,147,483,648 items/tick
3x Cards: 137,438,953,472 items/tick

In an IO Port, the Superluminal Acceleration Card will transfer fluids at a rate of:

1x Cards: 33,554,432,000 mb/tick
2x Cards: 2,147,483,648,000 mb/tick
3x Cards: 137,438,953,472,000 mb/tick

-8426991409753954133:-799755274906289542.name: EXTREME MIXING
-8426991409753954133:-799755274906289542.desc:
Well, maybe it's not as extreme as the quest name suggests, but it gets the job done.

You'll need one anyway so why not make one now and save some time on the mixing?

-8810216742118145435:-799013304107333849.name: NEI Next Level Search
-8810216742118145435:-799013304107333849.desc:
NEI search got improved even further!

Select a search mode extended+ to try it out!

Extended+ works pretty much like extended, but it doesn't support * and ? expanding in the names. Also the following symbols have to be escaped with a `\`: `-` (dash) `<` and `>` (less-than and more-than) `^` (caret) `{` and `}` (curly brackets) `|` (vertical bar) `\` (backslash) ` ` (space) `"` (quote) alongside with the prefixes that you have enabled like @ or $.

Examples: @Electro\-Magic, iron\ ingot, PB\&J.

Extended+ adds some QoL to your everyday search experience and an improved recipe search (next quest). In the following backticks `` are used around the search queries. You don't need them when searching.

Want to search for something without having to put a backslash before every other symbol? Use quotes! You could use a quote inside quotes too, but you would have to escape it. Like this: `"\""`.

Use curly brackets {} to group conditions. Searching for `{mytryl|manasteel} hammer head` would show you hammer heads made out of mytryl or manasteel.

Space is no longer necessary to use. So `{mytryl|manasteel}hammer` works too!

There's a space mode support, so if you want your spaces to work literally turn it on!

Quotes no longer require a closing quote. So you could search for `"iron ingot` and it would work! You still do need a quote if you want your quotes to end though.

Regex syntax got simplified (though the old one is still supported). Now instead of `r/some regex/` you could search for `/some regex` and it would work too! You still do need a slash if you want your regex to end. Regex doesn't require escaping, the same way quotes don't, with the only exception being the `/`. So to find a slash with a regex you would search with `/\/`.

You can use quotes or regex after prefix to search with them instead of a plain text. For example, use `@"chest minecarts` to search for items from the Iron Chest Minecarts mod. Or `@/chest minecarts` to do the same with a regex.

-7701056798770456536:-796854216127759936.name: Prismarine Recycling
-7701056798770456536:-796854216127759936.desc: Prismarine-Contaminated Hydrogen Peroxide is a byproduct of a couple different recipes in this line, it's best to recycle it for the bonus Prismarine Solution. Of course, you don't have to, but it would be ill-advised to avoid it.

-7384462910267243515:-794976567809328476.name: An Eye at the End of Time
-7384462910267243515:-794976567809328476.desc:
So you have made yourself an Eternal DTPF or hopefully a few, and now it is time for the push to the next tier, UXV.

Introducing the final multiblock in the game, and by far the most expensive.
It introduces 4 new materials: Raw Stellar Plasma, White and Black Dwarf Matter and finally Universium.

It has 3 different tiered casings with 9 tiers each:

Spacetime Compression Field Generator:
- Determines the tier of the planet block that can be run and decreases the processing time by 3% per tier.

Time Dilation Field Generator:
- Decreases recipe time by 50% per tier, while decreasing the chance of a recipe succeeding by 9.25% per tier.

Stabilisation Field Generator:
- Increases the chance of a recipe succeeding by 5% per tier, while decreasing the output of a recipe by 5% per tier.

Lower tier Stabilization Field Generators have a power output penalty.

Finding the best setup of different casing tiers might be a hard task, so a calculator visualizing all the drops and setups has been created: [url]https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/15j30mNnFIWBhwpJGuDrKTfiHBXNEEqyvB_r7ztFWlyQ[/url]

[note]Be sure to read the tooltip of the Eye of Harmony controller, it explains everything in detail! Depending on your GUI scale it might have multiple pages.[/note]

[note]Well... it explains mostly everything. The Eye of Harmony has an inbuilt pity system to make sure you don't lose your mind. Here's a quick rundown on how it operates:

(All chances are decimals here)
There is a counter C that starts at the current recipe success chance P. If a recipe fails, (1-P)*P is added to C. If C reaches >= 1, the next roll is guaranteed to succeed and C resets to P. 
If a recipe succeeds before C reaches >= 1, it resets in a similar manner.
If you switch recipes, C will be reset to P of the new recipe, even if the next roll would be a guarantee.
The guarantee can be canceled out by overflow penalties as they apply after the pity does. However, they do not reset C, so the guarantee is shifted to the next recipe cycle.
If parallels are > 1, pity doesn't apply.[/note]

-8955241440528385612:-787631825724871130.name: Fluid Void Cell
-8955241440528385612:-787631825724871130.desc:
[warn]Caution! Use with utmost care! This cell does exactly what it says. It deletes everything you put on there. So better make sure you have precise control over what can actually go there.[/warn]

[note]Will only void fluids, not items[/note]

-6806178318679823136:-785577623155983802.name: UIV Superconductors
-6806178318679823136:-785577623155983802.desc:
Didn't expect the Rhugnor, did you?

As usual, mix your exotic dusts, blast them, form into wires, and superconduct.

-5853265364517528724:-753490269362400206.name: Modular Upgrades
-5853265364517528724:-753490269362400206.desc:
Upgrades can be applied for pipes and modules, but an extra upgrade is needed if we need to apply upgrades to modules.

Here is the Upgrade Module Upgrade. But regardless of how many of these you stuff into a chassis, there will always be 2 module upgrades per module.

[note]Author's Note: Why is the Upgrade Module Upgrade the ONLY upgrade that has a more 3D-style texture while the other modules and upgrades are completely flat?[/note]

-7381838222159086836:-752699752946510900.name: But Duct Tape Already is Magical!
-7381838222159086836:-752699752946510900.desc:
The Wand Focus: Maintenance will fix all problems of a multiblock machine when used on its Maintenance Hatch. It won't prevent future issues, but it sure beats recharging your Soldering Iron for the 6th time.

[note]This focus accepts the following upgrade in the Focal Manipulator:[/note]
Frugal: Lowers vis cost to cast by 10% per level

-7444237521495181899:-777446151742165713.name: Storing Computation in the Cloud
-7444237521495181899:-777446151742165713.desc:
Wireless Computation is similar to Wireless Data, Cloud Computation Server Hatches send computation to Cloud Computation Client Hatches, which other multiblocks can use.

Place down a Server Hatch on a Quantum Computer, screwdriver the controller to enable Wireless Mode, then after placing down a Client Hatch, you have to set how much computation it should request from the Server Hatch.

[note]Wireless Data Hatches are N:M instead of 1:1[/note]

-5351576150087474953:-772796088423964438.name: Who Came Up With This Name??
-5351576150087474953:-772796088423964438.desc:
Sanitizing Soap isn't strong enough to keep up? 

This soap has a 50% Chance to reduce your normal warp, increased to 75% if you have the Warp Ward effect (obtained by Purifying Bath Salts) and increased to 100% if you're standing inside of the purifying fluid. 
This soap also has a 100% chance to cleanse all of your temporary warp!

In case you're wondering how to pronounce it: Don't even bother trying.

-8603019334928181566:-766078035665916567.name: Blaze Rods
-8603019334928181566:-766078035665916567.desc: Want some blaze rods? Buy some!

-5541872338101410607:-723630684402743595.name: UMV Glass
-5541872338101410607:-723630684402743595.desc: The next tier of Borosilicate glass is Transcendent (12).

-5895649105231252556:-743979955730558125.name: Clarifier
-5895649105231252556:-743979955730558125.desc: The first step in the water purification process is the clarifier. Operating this machine is a simple task, you will just need to maintain a steady supply of Activated Carbon for the filters. Using this machine, you will be able to make Grade 1 Purified Water, which can speed up processing of Naquadah-Doped Boules and Wafers by 25%.

-4634880186865065000:-740995853029255999.name: Raw Iron Ore Exchange
-4634880186865065000:-740995853029255999.desc: You can exchange your stack of Raw Iron Ore for vanilla Iron Ore.

-5675835535531457502:-729599426499154695.name: Heliothermal Plasma Fabricator
-5675835535531457502:-729599426499154695.desc:
As understanding of graviton shards continues to improve, better control over the materials they manipulate can be achieved. Graviton shards provide an alternative to electromagnetic containment of plasma using spacetime manipulation instead, allowing the Forge to directly output processed materials as plasma.

[note]The third module of the Godforge, Heliothermal Plasma Fabricator can directly convert materials into their plasma form, at the cost of an immense amount of power. This may not be ideal for every plasma, but can save a lot of time on particularly slow ones. Additionally, later upgrades allow the creation of exotic plasmas which cannot be created through other means.[/note]

[note]Usage of this module requires the GPCI upgrade.[/note]

-8557295371763424843:-729521446323852079.name: One Last Time
-8557295371763424843:-729521446323852079.desc: For the final circuit line currently in the game, you will need to either make one last circuit assembler, or a UEV hatch for your circuit assembly machine.

-8746080893915019949:-695871304293002165.name: A Small Reward: The Infinite Spray Can
-8746080893915019949:-695871304293002165.desc:
Congratulations! You have completed the Platinum Line. Not many players have the perseverance to accomplish this task. A small reward is in order!

The [note]Infinite Spray Can[/note] never runs out of paint, and contains all sixteen colors (as well as solvent!) Of course, line mode and Ring of Loki support are included. There are also many convenience features. Middle-click to open a color choice GUI. Middle-click a painted block to copy its color to the spray can. Left-click to cycle the active color (sneak to go backwards.) Sneak-middle-click to lock the can; while locked, you can't accidentally change the color. Sneak-middle-click to unlock.

Naturally, you'll have to craft the infinite spray can yourself. It's a Dire Crafting recipe, so hopefully you have a dire crafting table. It requires a lot of platinum line materials, of course. And, apparently, a rainbow cactus, so a small detour into magic will be necessary. And a bunch of random-looking AE2 parts. And an IV world accelerator. And... a fence?

Is this really a reward?

-6893323685044150631:-696251869047408018.name: Project Godforge
-6893323685044150631:-696251869047408018.desc:
With your research now complete, you have finally constructed it - the Forge of the Gods.

The Forge of the Gods is an immensely powerful structure constructed around a stabilized neutron star - it is so advanced that its full capabilities are not yet understood. However, through continued use, one can slowly upgrade and expand the range of abilities of the Forge, and learn the power hidden in the most extreme parts of the universe: [note]Graviton Shards[/note].

This esoteric material can only be found where conventional matter and degenerate neutronium crust matter on the surface of a neutron star meet. At this point in space, gravitons are far more common and irradiate this material mixture to create highly unstable graviton shards, which can be used to internally upgrade the Forge. While these shards cannot yet exist outside the extreme conditions of the Forge, with continued research and utilization it may be possible to eventually isolate and extract them outside the Forge - but for what purpose?

[note]Click on the logo in the UI to read more on how to operate the Godforge.[/note]

-5302417245690018536:-693648980858868334.name: Component Assembly Line
-5302417245690018536:-693648980858868334.desc: Check the NEI pages to see all the nice recipes this machine can handle for you. Great to craft GT components in bulk.

-5419019742266243031:-693447679816942972.name: Stabilized Baryonic Matter
-5419019742266243031:-693447679816942972.desc: After automating Absolute Baryonic Perfection Purification Unit, you slowly start getting Stabilized Baryonic Matter, at a rate of 500mb/parallel every 120 seconds.

-8869557855426175810:-714583298663381349.name: Thorium 232?
-8869557855426175810:-714583298663381349.desc:
So you were looking at Thorium 232 and wondering how to make it?

You could centrifuge it at a horrible chance rate with a long recipe but there are better ways of obtaining it.

The better ways are processing chains that can be made in three different paths with the third path being unlocked at a further stage after obtaining Fusion with the Neutron Activator.

The first path requires the chemical plant multiblock that you might not be familiar with but will become required to create rocket fuel for any tier three or higher rocket. This path is the fastest with only two steps to obtain the Thorium 232, but requires borax which can only be obtained (for now) through mining salt veins as a byproduct or through bees (probably the better option if you already have some).

The second path is a six step processing chain that requires Chemical Reactors, a Centrifuge, and an EBF. Even though it is longer it offers much better conversion ratio (75% instead of 25% in chemical plant), instead of borax it requires nitric acid (4000L per dust if you account for recycling) and 100L of fluorine per dust.

Either way I would recommend using AE2FC as it allows on demand fluid crafting which will assist in both processing chains.

-4655984694965074482:-707591184703138904.name: Silver Shulker Box
-4655984694965074482:-707591184703138904.desc:
The portable equivalent of the Silver Barrel.

Has 72 slots.

[note]Can be Dyed![/note]

-8476538164944458841:-705930499562312118.name: Space Modules Galore
-8476538164944458841:-705930499562312118.desc:
Better modules will require a more advanced Space Elevator motor to function.

This upgrade will allow you to access 15 modules on your Space Elevator. If you haven't built the expansion yet, now might be a good time.

[note]You can enable the Space Elevator expansion in the GUI.[/note]

-6762699094401055520:-704779051592441469.name: Refined Firestone
-6762699094401055520:-704779051592441469.desc:
Cut Firestone is the basic shape for producing Refined Firestone.
Use a Diamond Lens or Flint Lens for cutting.
It is then fired with lava in the EBF.

Lastly it is thrown into lava and charged by absorbing lava blocks around it.
It needs 5000 lava blocks to be fully charged, so a large lava lake is required, preferably in the Nether.

[note]If the firestone breaks, it can be repaired with lava in the EBF and recharged.[/note]

-4980171706292986537:-704696072177435937.name: Draconic Chest
-4980171706292986537:-704696072177435937.desc:
The Draconic Chest is a special upgrade of the compressed chest. In addition to a large inventory size and being able to retain it's contents, it has a crafting station and a furnace integrated directly into it. 

The smelting module can be powered by EU or RF and has an internal buffer of it's own. It can smelt up to 5 items at a time.

-5534359835533217609:-702431325264083022.name: Essentia
-5534359835533217609:-702431325264083022.desc:
This bee produces nothing directly but instead sacrifices its lifetime to generate liquid essentia for all your magical needs. To do so, however, it requires an Apimancer's Drainer beneath its housing.

The speed at which the bee produces essentia is affected by its production speed. You have to right-click the drainer with a filled phial of the desired essentia to lock it to that type.

You can breed them from chaotic and ordered bees.

You can also place up to 9 drainers beneath a single alveary as long as the blocks at the bottom are plain alveary blocks.

-6169558524259359740:-698092018874677304.name: Rich Nether Waste
-6169558524259359740:-698092018874677304.desc:
One of the ways you will be using the Poor Nether Waste is to combine it with the Hellish Mud you obtained earlier in the Mixer to create Rich Nether Waste. 

We will be using the Rich Nether Waste for the next step, and it will continue to be valuable for a while, though it does eventually become unecessary to the line when you reach UHV.

-9143660827823771849:-664283432729901348.name: Shirabon
-9143660827823771849:-664283432729901348.desc:
A helper material needed in some UMV and UXV components. Have fun making millions.

[note]This is extremely slow to make and to process.[/note]

-8255771698725672534:-677174001959218284.name: A Magical Lunchbox?
-8255771698725672534:-677174001959218284.desc:
Given sufficient magical prowess, the Thaumaturgist need not waste their time physically consuming food. The Talisman of Nourishment can hold up to 1000 hunger and 1000 saturation points, and will feed you automatically. 

You can fill it up by placing food items on your hotbar, the more valuable the food, the more points added.

[note]Careful not to place food items you want to keep in your hotbar while you have it on you![/note]

-9120793416319577555:-673136761505269244.name: Optimizing Patterns in Late Game!
-9120793416319577555:-673136761505269244.desc:
You have probably already seen the button called Optimize Patterns when making an order in your AE system, now it's time to put it in the good use!

To unlock this feature, just add a Pattern Optimization Matrix block to your AE system (you only need one).

# What does it do?

This feature allows you to multiply patterns that are needed in large amounts.

1. After calculating a big order, just click Optimize Patterns and you will be welcomed by a new window.
2. There you specify how much you wish for a singular pattern to be ordered (maximum amount of steps), we recommend putting it at 1000 or 100, [warn]remember that over-optimizing patterns could lead to longer waiting times[/warn]. At this point, you can also disable singular patterns from optimization by clicking on them, but there shouldn't be any unwanted patterns anyway if you already excluded them by toggling a button in unwanted interfaces.
§

3. Click Optimize and you are done! Try ordering again to see the changes in pattern steps

All changes are [warn]permanent and can't be reverted automatically[/warn] so make sure that you have excluded all unwanted interfaces (the Allow Pattern Optimization button is GRAY) like:
- Single Assembly Line interfaces
- Extreme Crafting interfaces
- And any interface that doesn't have (almost)infinite buffer at the other side (inf. chest/storage cells)
Patterns are only multiplied by powers of 2, so your AAL patterns should be safe.

[note]If you are still confused about maximum order steps here's an example:
Ordering an EOH calculates that it will need 1,000,008 UHV superconductors crafted (41667 steps, 24 UHV SC patterned), now you proceed to optimize patterns and specify that you wish it to do 1000 steps maximum, it will multiply your pattern 64 times to achieve that goal (41667 / 64 ~= 652 which is lower or equal to 1000). After clicking optimize, UHV SC pattern will now output 1536 UHV SC (24 before).[/note]

-7041794358275821537:-661381010895770040.name: Oceans in a Bottle
-7041794358275821537:-661381010895770040.desc: After managing to create an artificial universe capable of storing near-infinite amounts of items, you applied this same technology to your Fluid Digital Singularity Cell to create this truly magnificent piece of tech. This allows you to store up to 5 different types of fluids without the universe collapsing in on itself.

-6615881702968461094:-658294114342113810.name: High Voltage Multiblocks
-6615881702968461094:-658294114342113810.desc: Time to scale up production! In HV, a handful of new powerful multiblocks are available to you. In particular, take a look at the Large Chemical Reactor, which always perfectly overclocks, as well as the Distillation Tower, which will allow you to get all byproducts from distillation instead of targeting just one.

-5083942162575521758:-657962459846585302.name: Wireless Data for Your Assembly Lines!
-5083942162575521758:-657962459846585302.desc:
Wireless Data Bank Transmission Connector and Wireless Assembly line Reception Connector lets you avoid building and connecting dozens of Data Banks and Optical Fiber Cable for the upcoming Assembly Lines you might have to build.

To use it, you have to screwdriver the Data Bank that is storing the data sticks, place a Wireless Data Bank Transmission Connector into the Data Bank, then Wireless Assembly line Reception Connector for the Assembly Lines.

[note]Wireless Data Hatches are N:M instead of 1:1[/note]

-5875748521763021702:-657958288741038150.name: This is your Kryptonite!
-5875748521763021702:-657958288741038150.desc:
Here's the special Titanium I promised you. GT++ materials enter the fray here, both with this and the Titansteel you need to add to that to make what comes next!

That step only comes after fusing Niobium and Zinc into Krypton Plasma. You get a rarer noble gas here than before, the next one will be Xenon. This recipe matches in speed with the next one, which uses Krypton to make Astral Titanium Plasma, by adding in the final plasma of the previous chain, Force Plasma! That's right, each chain needs everything from before to continue.

Once you have Astral Titanium Plasma, you can move on to the final mk2 step.

-7613245622972716356:-657482335316153110.name: Purifying Water With Plasma
-7613245622972716356:-657482335316153110.desc:
As usual, before you can make use of your Americium to make better wafers, you will need better water. This time, we're going to use plasma to rapidly heat up the water and then cool it back down.

Some of the mechanics may seem similar to how you set up the pH neutralization process, maybe you can expand on what you learned there?

[note]This multiblock is very picky about where its plasma and coolant input hatches go. If you can't figure out why it's not forming, chances are you forgot to place these hatches in the correct location. Use the hologram projector to see where they go.[/note]

-6650556070435655322:-652447293380426098.name: Keeping your energy hatch from overheating
-6650556070435655322:-652447293380426098.desc: You have two options here. Either you followed the NaK quests or you made a vacuum freezer to cool helium.

-8743907766268867509:-650687490429765180.name: UEV Glass
-8743907766268867509:-650687490429765180.desc: The next tier of Borosilicate glass is Cosmic Neutronium (10).

-5594786792833372990:-649454604051157497.name: A Not So Useful Scanner...
-5594786792833372990:-649454604051157497.desc:
...but a very useful meter.

GT EU Meter will give you basic information about electricity in your cables and machines.

[note]A more advanced version is available in MV and will allow you to gather much more data, so come back to this tab later to find it.[/note]

-5030660532125308103:-645846229092648394.name: NEI is EVEN MORE POWERFUL NOW?
-5030660532125308103:-645846229092648394.desc:
NEI now automatically collapses similar items into one slot making browsing much faster! To collapse/uncollapse a group use ALT+LMB.
You can also create your own presets with custom groups!

[note]You can disable this functionality in NEI settings[/note]

Also now NEI has JEI-like Advanced Search:

@ - search by mod (@minecraft)

[note]There are even more special characters that you can use but most of them are off by default (e.g. no need to use # to search in tooltip), below are all the special characters, check which ones are on/off in NEI settings.

Space is used as a logical AND between different conditions
# - search by tooltip (#UV-Tier)
& - search by id: (&95:15 extratrees:door)
$ - search by ore dictionary ($ore)
% - search by subsets (%block)
| - logical or. multi-item search (wrench|hammer)
- - logical not. exclude items that match the following expression (-@minecraft)
" - multiple words wrapped in quotes are treated as one condition rather than several ("White Stained Glass")

Search Mode (apply on search parts, not full string):
Plain - simple string
Extended - allow only ?, * rules (by default)
Regex - allow full regex

In Extended Search Mode:
? - any character (@min?craft)
* - any few characters (@m*ft = @minecraft)
r/.../ - standard java regex (@r/m\w{6}ft/ = @minecraft)[/note]

[note]You can disable this functionality in NEI settings.[/note]

You can add bookmarks with the A key while hovering over an item, also:
Hold SHIFT to bookmark the whole recipe
Hold CTRL to bookmark number of items
Hold SHIFT + CTRL to bookmark both recipe and all the number of all the items it contains

-8875238551243913734:-643492285706873804.name: Drone are not Drones!
-8875238551243913734:-643492285706873804.desc:
...but they can be as industrious as bees. These new electric friends are great companions for Multiblock machines: maintenance, control, management—they can do it all.

The Drone Centre is a newly designed machine. It doesn't need power; just put a drone into it and it will start running.
Once running, the drone will automatically scan for a 'Drone Downlink Module' (replacing maintenance hatches on Multiblock machines) within a certain range and attempt to establish a connection with the host. If successful, you can remotely control this Multiblock machine from the Drone Centre GUI! Additionally, you can rename the machine for easier identification.

[note]You can rename it either by right-clicking the Drone Downlink Module or in the Drone Centre GUI.[/note]

Placing more advanced drones will increase the range of the Drone Centre, with no limit on the amount of drones.

[warn]Notice that drones may crash during operation—the probability decreases from Tier 1 to Tier 3, and Tier 3 Anti-Gravity Drones never crash.
Besides, If the machine host is too far from the Drone Centre, the GUI remote control function will be disabled, but the turn-on/off-all-button and maintenance functions will still work.[/warn]

Maybe one day, our drone can control machines on other planets...drive engine online!

-6861911456329097050:-608388839116103310.name: Your First SpaceTime
-6861911456329097050:-608388839116103310.desc:
[note]Hurrah, you can finally move on to the UMV tier![/note]

The residue produced from the DTPFs seems to have an interesting interaction with reality, as if it bends the universe to its will.

What if you combined it with some infinity and hypogen to excite it, and an energized tesseract as a way to fling it back and forth to the 4th Dimension?

Maybe then you could achieve the unachievable, a building block of the entire universe.

[note]The base recipe is horrible, so definitely make the Eternal Coils for your DTPF first.

Congrats on making it this far![/note]

-8127302345207551228:-607829607103619021.name: UIV Field Generator
-8127302345207551228:-607829607103619021.desc: A bit expensive, but worth the QoL items you can craft with it.

-9034456121309152193:-606527206315823721.name: Research Completer
-9034456121309152193:-606527206315823721.desc:
Let's face it... nobody (sane) wants to do all of their research manually!

Now that you've learned how to collect nodes and create a wand recharging pedestal you can make the research completer. This quest shows the minimum required blocks but the structure can be up to 13 in length.

This machine will consume EU and eat nodes placed in the center of it in exchange for completing research notes given to it. If you're using a long machine it's highly recommended you use node stabilizers underneath your nodes to prevent them from destroying each other.

[note]Of course you need to research the Research Completer, you'll find it in the electro-magic tools tab.[/note]

-7108514021348170205:-632577057172505837.name: Under Pressure
-7108514021348170205:-632577057172505837.desc: Bigger, better, faster. The Large Electric Compressor does about what you would expect.

-6404757342473472628:-616377351818947640.name: UIV Glass
-6404757342473472628:-616377351818947640.desc: The next tier of Borosilicate glass is Infinity (11).

-6708805810511929325:-615253052507080052.name: Automating Crafting Table Recipes
-6708805810511929325:-615253052507080052.desc:
Automating crafting table recipes is a good first step to automate your processes.

To achieve this goal, get yourself a crafting logistics pipe and a logistics crafting table.

You can import a crafting table recipe into a logistics crafting table and you can click the "import" button on the crafting logistics pipes GUI that is connected to the crafting table to import the recipe into the pipe.

-6003979525766501212:-613307475510989610.name: STEAM-POWERED BREAKTHROUGH
-6003979525766501212:-613307475510989610.desc:
You should have quite the collection of single block Steam machines by now. While these may have gotten you through processing small amounts of materials, there will be a time when you will have to process a multitude of items. This is where Multiblocks come in.

While these Multiblocks have a material cost that is way higher than their single block counterparts, they have certain bonuses: they use less Steam, and they can process recipes in parallel, which means that a single recipe cycle can craft multiple items at once, if the Steam provided is enough to sustain it.

They do however have some quirks that need to be taken care of:

-These Multiblocks require very specific I/O blocks, use only those that are part of the quest
-They process up to 8 items, where the Basic Tier is made of Bronze and High Pressure Tier is made of Steel (checkout the Multiblock Preview in NEI which will show you different levels of tiers)
-The Tier and amount of parallel processing can be seen via WAILA if you are looking at the Controller Block

[note]With this quest, you have started your journey with Mass Processing. However, don't get too excited quite yet. While there are some Multiblocks accessible in the Steam Age, most of them only unlock in EV or later, including better versions of these Multiblocks.[/note]

-5092663277638354864:-612759269895403843.name: Adv. Stocking Bus
-5092663277638354864:-612759269895403843.desc:
Stocking bus but better!

This one can pull first 16 types of items automatically from ME network, which can be useful for some automations. Minimum stack size and refresh time can be configured in the GUI.

[note]Using this on your main network is probably not a very good idea.[/note]

-6913291740074859566:-610720972545515440.name: A Better Rocket Fuel
-6913291740074859566:-610720972545515440.desc:
If you want to go further than Mars you need a better rocket fuel. From here on out, there is only one choice: the ExxonMobil Chemical Plant. If you don't have one yet, you should have a look at it. It has 4 separate tiering systems and might be a bit overwhelming at first. 

[note]Check out the quest for the Chemical Plant in the [quest]Multiblock Goals[/quest] quest tab for more information.[/note]

If you already automated one of the upcoming rocket fuels, simply hold 32 cells of it to skip all quests leading up to it!

-5237970507635708994:-580294660096476613.name: Loonium
-5237970507635708994:-580294660096476613.desc:
This flower uses mana to randomly produce dungeon loot that would be found in chests in your world. This loot drops as items. It can be disabled at will by applying a redstone signal.

[note]Here you have a list of all possible drops[/note]

[url]https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1EzFQYnL53GdzXxs6H2lVM2QJEgNEAUG1vSS-15DPPSM/edit?gid=0#gid=0[/url]

-7231203481252809438:-577660927183504928.name: UHV Glass
-7231203481252809438:-577660927183504928.desc: The next tier of Borosilicate glass is Neutronium (9).

-8796313451559844100:-600473071292414183.name: Lapotron
-8796313451559844100:-600473071292414183.desc: This magnificent breed of Bee produces a whole plethora of useful resources, including endless amounts of Lapis, Energium, and Lapotron Dust. However, they are somewhat picky when it comes to breeding; you'll need Energium and Lapis Bees as parents, and the process must take place on the Moon under icy temperatures.

-5264682334615126317:-594005900889736436.name: Draconic Development
-5264682334615126317:-594005900889736436.desc:
The Draconic Fusion Crafted has 5 tier of casings, each an upgrade of the previous tier.

Each new tier of casings allows you to make better Cores, eventually ending at the Chaotic Core.

[note]Recipe time is divided by number of tiers above recipe tier![/note]

-5799940466139612122:-591933036366867561.name: Use Nano Tech to produce Lanthanides
-5799940466139612122:-591933036366867561.desc:
After unlocking Carbon Nanites, we can now use it to extract the needed lanthanide resources in large quantities.

Of course you better be ready. It's expensive until you got the Nano Forge.

-6232511347414889484:-591859900896757058.name: UMV Field Generator
-6232511347414889484:-591859900896757058.desc: Another Field Generator... you are almost done.

-6419188510011851715:-591023989115805288.name: Does It Contain A Black Hole?
-6419188510011851715:-591023989115805288.desc:
The Artificial Gravity Generator allows you to change the gravity around it to your liking. The Artificial Gravity Disruptor disables that behavior for whoever has it equipped and enabled.

[note]Surely this can't be used with malicious intent...[/note]

-6315858637026935192:-588469428166817952.name: Brittle Netherite Scrap
-6315858637026935192:-588469428166817952.desc:
You're so close... just a few more steps.

Now that you've attained the Netherite Scrap Seeds, you can combine them with Poor Nether Waste in a Chemical Bath for a 50% chance to get 3 Brittle Netherite Scraps. As a bonus, there's even a 50% chance that you get your Netherite Scrap Seed back to run the recipe over again. 

[note]Don't worry, this is the last Netherite recipe based on chance.[/note]
